This file is a merged representation of a subset of the codebase, containing files not matching ignore patterns, combined into a single document by Repomix.
The content has been processed where line numbers have been added.

================================================================
File Summary
================================================================

Purpose:
--------
This file contains a packed representation of a subset of the repository's contents that is considered the most important context.
It is designed to be easily consumable by AI systems for analysis, code review,
or other automated processes.

File Format:
------------
The content is organized as follows:
1. This summary section
2. Repository information
3. Directory structure
4. Repository files (if enabled)
5. Multiple file entries, each consisting of:
  a. A separator line (================)
  b. The file path (File: path/to/file)
  c. Another separator line
  d. The full contents of the file
  e. A blank line

Usage Guidelines:
-----------------
- This file should be treated as read-only. Any changes should be made to the
  original repository files, not this packed version.
- When processing this file, use the file path to distinguish
  between different files in the repository.
- Be aware that this file may contain sensitive information. Handle it with
  the same level of security as you would the original repository.

Notes:
------
- Some files may have been excluded based on .gitignore rules and Repomix's configuration
- Binary files are not included in this packed representation. Please refer to the Repository Structure section for a complete list of file paths, including binary files
- Files matching these patterns are excluded: node_modules/**, vendor/**, .git/**, storage/**, tests/**, public/**, resources/assets/**, *.min.js, *.css, *.scss, *.json, *.lock, *.log
- Files matching patterns in .gitignore are excluded
- Files matching default ignore patterns are excluded
- Line numbers have been added to the beginning of each line
- Files are sorted by Git change count (files with more changes are at the bottom)

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/AgendaController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use App\Models\Agenda;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
10: 
11: class AgendaController extends Controller
12: {
13:     public function index()
14:     {
15:         $agendas = Agenda::orderBy('created_at', 'desc')->paginate(10);
16:         return view('admin.references.agenda.index', compact('agendas'));
17:     }
18: 
19:     public function search(Request $request)
20:     {
21:         $search = $request->get('search');
22:         
23:         $agendas = Agenda::where('nama_agenda', 'like', "%{$search}%")
24:             ->orWhere('divisi', 'like', "%{$search}%")
25:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
26:             ->paginate(10);
27: 
28:         return view('admin.references.agenda.index', compact('agendas'));
29:     }
30: 
31:     public function create()
32:     {
33:         return view('admin.references.agenda.create');
34:     }
35: 
36:     public function store(Request $request)
37:     {
38:         $validated = $request->validate([
39:             'nama_agenda' => 'required|string|max:255',
40:             'divisi' => 'required|string|max:255',
41:             'prioritas' => 'required|in:rendah,sedang,tinggi',
42:             'tanggal_mulai' => 'required|date',
43:             'tanggal_deadline' => 'required|date|after:tanggal_mulai',
44:             'catatan' => 'nullable|string'
45:         ]);
46: 
47:         $validated['id_user'] = Auth::id();
48:         $validated['status'] = 'pending';
49: 
50:         Agenda::create($validated);
51: 
52:         return redirect()
53:             ->route('admin.agenda.index')
54:             ->with('success', 'Agenda berhasil ditambahkan!');
55:     }
56: 
57:     public function show($id)
58:     {
59:         $agenda = Agenda::findOrFail($id);
60:         return view('admin.references.agenda.show', compact('agenda'));
61:     }
62: 
63:     public function edit($id)
64:     {
65:         $agenda = Agenda::findOrFail($id);
66:         return view('admin.references.agenda.edit', compact('agenda'));
67:     }
68: 
69:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
70:     {
71:         $validated = $request->validate([
72:             'nama_agenda' => 'required|string|max:255',
73:             'divisi' => 'required|string|max:255',
74:             'prioritas' => 'required|in:rendah,sedang,tinggi',
75:             'tanggal_mulai' => 'required|date',
76:             'tanggal_deadline' => 'required|date|after:tanggal_mulai',
77:             'catatan' => 'nullable|string'
78:         ]);
79: 
80:         $agenda = Agenda::findOrFail($id);
81:         $agenda->update($validated);
82: 
83:         return redirect()
84:             ->route('admin.agenda.index')
85:             ->with('success', 'Agenda berhasil diperbarui!');
86:     }
87: 
88:     public function delete($id)
89:     {
90:         $agenda = Agenda::findOrFail($id);
91:         $agenda->delete();
92: 
93:         return redirect()
94:             ->route('admin.agenda.index')
95:             ->with('success', 'Agenda berhasil dihapus!');
96:     }
97: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/AnnualController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  9: 
 10: 
 11: class AnnualController extends Controller
 12: {
 13:     public function index()
 14:     {
 15:         $annualReports = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'laporanA')->paginate(10);
 16:         return view('admin.references.report.annual.index', compact('annualReports'));
 17:     }
 18:     
 19:     public function create()
 20:     {
 21:         return view('admin.references.report.annual.create');
 22:     }
 23:     
 24:     public function store(Request $request)
 25:     {
 26:         $request->validate([
 27:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 28:             'tahun' => 'required|integer|min:1900|max:' . date('Y'), // validasi tahun
 29:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string',
 30:             'url' => 'required|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240', // Max 10MB
 31:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Max 2MB
 32:         ]);
 33:         
 34:         // Handle file uploads dengan menyimpan nama original
 35:         $pdfFile = $request->file('url');
 36:         $pdfOriginalName = $pdfFile->getClientOriginalName();
 37:         $pdfPath = $pdfFile->storeAs('annual/pdf', $pdfOriginalName, 'public');
 38:         
 39:         $fotoFile = $request->file('foto');
 40:         $fotoOriginalName = $fotoFile->getClientOriginalName();
 41:         $fotoPath = $fotoFile->storeAs('annual/images', $fotoOriginalName, 'public');
 42:         
 43:         // Create new record
 44:         ProdukModel::create([
 45:             'nama' => $request->nama,
 46:             'url' => $pdfPath,
 47:             'deskripsi' => $request->deskripsi,
 48:             'foto' => $fotoPath,
 49:             'tahun' => $request->tahun,
 50:             'tipe' => 'pdf',
 51:             'kategori' => 'laporanA',
 52:         ]);
 53:         
 54:         return redirect()->route('admin.annual.index')
 55:             ->with('success', 'Laporan tahunan berhasil ditambahkan!');
 56:     }
 57: 
 58:     public function show($id)
 59:     {
 60:         $annualReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 61:         return view('admin.references.report.annual.show', compact('annualReport'));
 62:     }
 63: 
 64:     public function edit($id)
 65:     {
 66:         $annualReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 67: 
 68:         return view('admin.references.report.annual.edit', compact('annualReport'));
 69:     }
 70: 
 71:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 72:     {
 73:         $request->validate([
 74:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 75:             'tahun' => 'required|integer|min:1900|max:' . date('Y'), // validasi tahun
 76:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1024',
 77:             'url' => 'nullable|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240', // Optional saat edit
 78:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Optional saat edit
 79:         ]);
 80:     
 81:         $annualReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 82:     
 83:         // Update file if new file is uploaded (dengan nama original)
 84:         if ($request->hasFile('url')) {
 85:             if ($annualReport->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($annualReport->url)) {
 86:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($annualReport->url);
 87:             }
 88:             $pdfFile = $request->file('url');
 89:             $pdfOriginalName = $pdfFile->getClientOriginalName();
 90:             $pdfPath = $pdfFile->storeAs('annual/pdf', $pdfOriginalName, 'public');
 91:             $annualReport->url = $pdfPath;
 92:         }
 93:     
 94:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 95:             if ($annualReport->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($annualReport->foto)) {
 96:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($annualReport->foto);
 97:             }
 98:             $fotoFile = $request->file('foto');
 99:             $fotoOriginalName = $fotoFile->getClientOriginalName();
100:             $fotoPath = $fotoFile->storeAs('annual/images', $fotoOriginalName, 'public');
101:             $annualReport->foto = $fotoPath;
102:         }
103:     
104:         // Update other fields
105:         $annualReport->nama = $request->nama;
106:         $annualReport->deskripsi = $request->deskripsi;
107:         $annualReport->tahun = $request->tahun;
108:         $annualReport->save();
109:     
110:         return redirect()->route('admin.annual.index')
111:             ->with('success', 'Laporan tahunan berhasil diperbarui!');
112:     }
113:     
114:     public function delete($id)
115:     {
116:         $annualReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
117:     
118:         // Hapus file jika ada
119:         if ($annualReport->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($annualReport->url)) {
120:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($annualReport->url);
121:         }
122:     
123:         if ($annualReport->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($annualReport->foto)) {
124:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($annualReport->foto);
125:         }
126:     
127:         $annualReport->delete();
128:     
129:         return redirect()->route('admin.annual.index')
130:             ->with('success', 'Laporan tahunan berhasil dihapus!');
131:     }
132:     
133:     public function search(Request $request)
134:     {
135:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
136:         
137:         $annualReports = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'laporanA')
138:             ->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
139:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
140:             ->paginate(10);
141:         
142:         return view('admin.references.report.annual.index', compact('annualReports'));
143:     }
144: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/BukuController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  9: 
 10: class BukuController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $books = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buku')->paginate(10);
 15:         return view('admin.references.buku.index', compact('books'));
 16:     }
 17:     
 18:     public function create()
 19:     {
 20:         return view('admin.references.buku.create');
 21:     }
 22:     
 23:     public function store(Request $request)
 24:     {
 25:         $request->validate([
 26:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 27:             'tahun' => 'required|integer|min:1900|max:' . date('Y'),
 28:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string',
 29:             'url' => 'required|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240', // Max 10MB
 30:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Max 2MB
 31:         ]);
 32:         
 33:         // Handle file uploads dengan menyimpan nama original
 34:         $pdfFile = $request->file('url');
 35:         $pdfOriginalName = $pdfFile->getClientOriginalName();
 36:         $pdfPath = $pdfFile->storeAs('books/pdf', $pdfOriginalName, 'public');
 37:         
 38:         $fotoFile = $request->file('foto');
 39:         $fotoOriginalName = $fotoFile->getClientOriginalName();
 40:         $fotoPath = $fotoFile->storeAs('books/images', $fotoOriginalName, 'public');
 41:         
 42:         // Create new record
 43:         ProdukModel::create([
 44:             'nama' => $request->nama,
 45:             'url' => $pdfPath,
 46:             'deskripsi' => $request->deskripsi,
 47:             'foto' => $fotoPath,
 48:             'tahun' => $request->tahun,
 49:             'tipe' => 'pdf',
 50:             'kategori' => 'buku',
 51:         ]);
 52:         
 53:         return redirect()->route('admin.buku.index')
 54:             ->with('success', 'Buku berhasil ditambahkan!');
 55:     }
 56: 
 57:     public function show($id)
 58:     {
 59:         $book = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 60:         return view('admin.references.buku.show', compact('book'));
 61:     }
 62: 
 63:     public function edit($id)
 64:     {
 65:         $book = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 66:         return view('admin.references.buku.edit', compact('book'));
 67:     }
 68: 
 69:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 70:     {
 71:         $request->validate([
 72:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 73:             'tahun' => 'required|integer|min:1900|max:' . date('Y'),
 74:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1024',
 75:             'url' => 'nullable|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240', // Optional during edit
 76:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Optional during edit
 77:         ]);
 78:     
 79:         $book = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 80:     
 81:         // Update file if new file is uploaded (dengan nama original)
 82:         if ($request->hasFile('url')) {
 83:             if ($book->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($book->url)) {
 84:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($book->url);
 85:             }
 86:             $pdfFile = $request->file('url');
 87:             $pdfOriginalName = $pdfFile->getClientOriginalName();
 88:             $pdfPath = $pdfFile->storeAs('books/pdf', $pdfOriginalName, 'public');
 89:             $book->url = $pdfPath;
 90:         }
 91:     
 92:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 93:             if ($book->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($book->foto)) {
 94:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($book->foto);
 95:             }
 96:             $fotoFile = $request->file('foto');
 97:             $fotoOriginalName = $fotoFile->getClientOriginalName();
 98:             $fotoPath = $fotoFile->storeAs('books/images', $fotoOriginalName, 'public');
 99:             $book->foto = $fotoPath;
100:         }
101:     
102:         // Update other fields
103:         $book->nama = $request->nama;
104:         $book->deskripsi = $request->deskripsi;
105:         $book->tahun = $request->tahun;
106:         $book->save();
107:     
108:         return redirect()->route('admin.buku.index')
109:             ->with('success', 'Buku berhasil diperbarui!');
110:     }
111:     
112:     public function delete($id)
113:     {
114:         $book = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
115:     
116:         // Delete files if they exist
117:         if ($book->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($book->url)) {
118:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($book->url);
119:         }
120:     
121:         if ($book->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($book->foto)) {
122:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($book->foto);
123:         }
124:     
125:         $book->delete();
126:     
127:         return redirect()->route('admin.buku.index')
128:             ->with('success', 'Buku berhasil dihapus!');
129:     }
130:     
131:     public function search(Request $request)
132:     {
133:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
134:         
135:         $books = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buku')
136:             ->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
137:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
138:             ->paginate(10);
139:         
140:         return view('admin.references.buku.index', compact('books'));
141:     }
142: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/BuletinController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  7: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  9: 
 10: class BuletinController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $buletins = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buletin')
 15:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 16:             ->paginate(12);
 17:         return view('admin.references.buletin.index', compact('buletins'));
 18:     }
 19: 
 20:     public function search(Request $request)
 21:     {
 22:         $search = $request->get('search');
 23:         
 24:         $buletins = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buletin')
 25:             ->where(function($query) use ($search) {
 26:                 $query->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
 27:                     ->orWhere('tahun', 'like', "%{$search}%");
 28:             })
 29:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 30:             ->paginate(12);
 31: 
 32:         return view('admin.references.buletin.index', compact('buletins'));
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     public function create()
 36:     {
 37:         return view('admin.references.buletin.create');
 38:     }
 39: 
 40:     public function store(Request $request)
 41:     {
 42:         $validated = $request->validate([
 43:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 44:             'tahun' => 'required|numeric|min:2000|max:2100',
 45:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000',
 46:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg|max:2048',
 47:             'file' => 'required|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240'
 48:         ]);
 49: 
 50:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 51:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('buletin/images', 'public');
 52:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
 53:         }
 54: 
 55:         if ($request->hasFile('file')) {
 56:             $filePath = $request->file('file')->store('buletin/pdf', 'public');
 57:             $validated['url'] = $filePath;
 58:         }
 59: 
 60:         $validated['kategori'] = 'buletin';
 61:         $validated['tipe'] = 'pdf';
 62: 
 63:         $buletin = ProdukModel::create($validated);
 64: 
 65:         return redirect()
 66:             ->route('admin.buletin.index')
 67:             ->with('success', 'Buletin berhasil ditambahkan!');
 68:     }
 69: 
 70:     public function show($id)
 71:     {
 72:         $buletin = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 73:         return view('admin.references.buletin.show', compact('buletin'));
 74:     }
 75: 
 76:     public function edit($id)
 77:     {
 78:         $buletin = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 79:         return view('admin.references.buletin.edit', compact('buletin'));
 80:     }
 81: 
 82:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 83:     {
 84:         $buletin = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buletin')->findOrFail($id);
 85:         
 86:         $validated = $request->validate([
 87:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 88:             'tahun' => 'required|numeric|min:2000|max:2100',
 89:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000',
 90:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg|max:2048',
 91:             'file' => 'nullable|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240'
 92:         ]);
 93: 
 94:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 95:             if ($buletin->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($buletin->foto)) {
 96:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($buletin->foto);
 97:             }
 98:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('buletin/images', 'public');
 99:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
100:         }
101: 
102:         if ($request->hasFile('file')) {
103:             if ($buletin->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($buletin->url)) {
104:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($buletin->url);
105:             }
106:             $filePath = $request->file('file')->store('buletin/pdf', 'public');
107:             $validated['url'] = $filePath;
108:         }
109: 
110:         $buletin->update($validated);
111: 
112:         return redirect()
113:             ->route('admin.buletin.index')
114:             ->with('success', 'Buletin berhasil diperbarui!');
115:     }
116: 
117:     public function delete($id)
118:     {
119:         $buletin = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buletin')->findOrFail($id);
120:         
121:         if ($buletin->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($buletin->foto)) {
122:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($buletin->foto);
123:         }
124:         
125:         if ($buletin->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($buletin->url)) {
126:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($buletin->url);
127:         }
128: 
129:         $buletin->delete();
130: 
131:         return redirect()
132:             ->route('admin.buletin.index')
133:             ->with('success', 'Buletin berhasil dihapus!');
134:     }
135: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/CRMController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use App\Models\CRM;
 8: use App\Models\UserModel;
 9: 
10: class CRMController extends Controller
11: {
12:     public function index()
13:     {
14:         $permohonan = CRM::orderBy('created_at', 'desc')->paginate(10);
15:         return view('admin.crm.permohonan.index', compact('permohonan'));
16:     }
17: 
18:     public function search(Request $request)
19:     {
20:         $search = $request->get('search');
21:         
22:         $permohonan = CRM::where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
23:             ->orWhere('email', 'like', "%{$search}%")
24:             ->orWhere('nama_perusahaan', 'like', "%{$search}%")
25:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
26:             ->paginate(10);
27: 
28:         return view('admin.crm.permohonan.index', compact('permohonan'));
29:     }
30: 
31:     public function show($id)
32:     {
33:         $permohonan = CRM::findOrFail($id);
34:         return view('admin.crm.permohonan.show', compact('permohonan'));
35:     }
36: 
37:     public function approve($id)
38:     {
39:         $permohonan = CRM::findOrFail($id);
40: 
41:         // Update user role
42:         if ($permohonan->id_user) {
43:             $user = UserModel::find($permohonan->id_user);
44:             if ($user) {
45:                 $user->role = 'userk';
46:                 $user->save();
47:             }
48:         }
49: 
50:         // Delete the request after approval
51:         $permohonan->delete();
52: 
53:         return redirect()
54:             ->route('admin.crm.permohonan')
55:             ->with('success', 'Permohonan berhasil disetujui dan role user telah diupdate');
56:     }
57: 
58:     public function reject($id)
59:     {
60:         $permohonan = CRM::findOrFail($id);
61:         
62:         // Delete the request after rejection
63:         $permohonan->delete();
64: 
65:         return redirect()
66:             ->route('admin.crm.permohonan')
67:             ->with('success', 'Permohonan berhasil ditolak');
68:     }
69: }

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;

 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
 8: use App\Models\ClientData;
 9: 
10: class DashboardController extends Controller
11: {
12:     public function index()
13:     {
14:         // Hitung jumlah foto (produk dengan tipe image)
15:         $countFoto = ProdukModel::where('tipe', 'image')->count();
16:         
17:         // Hitung jumlah video
18:         $countVideo = ProdukModel::where('tipe', 'video')->count();
19:         
20:         // Hitung jumlah twibbon
21:         $countTwibbon = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')->count();
22:         
23:         // Hitung jumlah client
24:         $countClient = ClientData::count();
25:         
26:         // Ambil 3 update terbaru
27:         $recentUpdates = ProdukModel::orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
28:                                 ->take(3)
29:                                 ->get();
30:         
31:         return view('admin.dashboard.index', compact(
32:             'countFoto', 
33:             'countVideo', 
34:             'countTwibbon', 
35:             'countClient',
36:             'recentUpdates'
37:         ));
38:     }
39: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/DataClientController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
 3: 
 4: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\User;
 7: use App\Models\ClientData;
 8: use App\Models\CRM;
 9: 
10: class DataClientController extends Controller
11: {
12:     public function index()
13:     {
14:         $clients = ClientData::with('user')->get();
15:         return view('admin.crm.data-client.index', compact('clients'));
16:     }
17: 
18:     public function search(Request $request)
19:     {
20:         $search = $request->get('search');
21:         
22:         $clients = ClientData::with('user')
23:             ->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
24:             ->orWhere('telepon', 'like', "%{$search}%")
25:             ->paginate(10);
26: 
27:         return view('admin.crm.data-client.index', compact('clients'));
28:     }
29: 
30:     public function create()
31:     {
32:         $users = User::all();
33:         return view('admin.crm.data-client.create', compact('users'));
34:     }
35: 
36:     public function store(Request $request)
37:     {
38:         $validated = $request->validate([
39:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
40:             'email' => 'required|email|max:255',
41:             'telepon' => 'required|string|max:20',
42:             'alamat_perusahaan' => 'required|string',
43:             'status_project' => 'required|in:current,past,potential',
44:             'id_user' => 'required|exists:user,id_user',
45:         ]);
46: 
47:         ClientData::create($validated);
48: 
49:         return redirect()
50:             ->route('admin.crm.data-client')
51:             ->with('success', 'Client added successfully');
52:     }
53: 
54:     public function edit($id)
55:     {
56:         $client = ClientData::where('id_client_data', $id)->firstOrFail();
57:         $users = User::all();
58:         return view('admin.crm.data-client.edit', compact('client', 'users'));
59:     }
60: 
61:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
62:     {
63:         $validated = $request->validate([
64:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
65:             'email' => 'required|email|max:255',
66:             'telepon' => 'required|string|max:20',
67:             'alamat_perusahaan' => 'required|string',
68:             'status_project' => 'required|in:current,past,potential',
69:             'id_user' => 'required|exists:user,id_user',
70:         ]);
71: 
72:         $client = ClientData::where('id_client_data', $id)->firstOrFail();
73:         $client->update($validated);
74: 
75:         return redirect()
76:             ->route('admin.crm.data-client')
77:             ->with('success', 'Client updated successfully');
78:     }
79: 
80:     public function destroy($id)
81:     {
82:         $client = ClientData::where('id_client_data', $id)->firstOrFail();
83:         $client->delete();
84:         return redirect()->route('admin.crm.data-client')->with('success', 'Client deleted successfully');
85:     }
86: 
87:     public function permohonan()
88:     {
89:         $permohonan = CRM::all();
90:         return view('admin.crm.permohonan.index', compact('permohonan'));
91:     }
92: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/FlyerController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  7: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  9: 
 10: class FlyerController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $flyers = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer')
 15:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 16:             ->paginate(12);
 17:         return view('admin.pictures.flyer-ucapan.index', compact('flyers'));
 18:     }
 19: 
 20:     public function search(Request $request)
 21:     {
 22:         $search = $request->get('search');
 23:         
 24:         $flyers = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer')
 25:             ->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
 26:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 27:             ->paginate(12);
 28: 
 29:         return view('admin.pictures.flyer-ucapan.index', compact('flyers'));
 30:     }
 31: 
 32:     public function create()
 33:     {
 34:         return view('admin.pictures.flyer-ucapan.create');
 35:     }
 36: 
 37:     public function store(Request $request)
 38:     {
 39:         $validated = $request->validate([
 40:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 41:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048',
 42:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000'
 43:         ]);
 44: 
 45:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 46:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('flyer', 'public');
 47:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
 48:         }
 49: 
 50:         // Add additional fields
 51:         $validated['kategori'] = 'flyer';
 52:         $validated['tipe'] = 'image';
 53:         $validated['url'] = 'https://example.com/flyers/' . time(); // Random URL
 54:         $validated['tahun'] = now()->year;
 55: 
 56:         ProdukModel::create($validated);
 57: 
 58:         return redirect()->route('admin.flyer.index')
 59:             ->with('success', 'Flyer berhasil ditambahkan!');
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     public function edit($id)
 63:     {
 64:         $flyer = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer')
 65:             ->findOrFail($id);
 66:         return view('admin.pictures.flyer-ucapan.edit', compact('flyer'));
 67:     }
 68: 
 69:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 70:     {
 71:         $flyer = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer')
 72:             ->findOrFail($id);
 73:         
 74:         $validated = $request->validate([
 75:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 76:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048',
 77:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000'
 78:         ]);
 79: 
 80:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 81:             // Delete old file if exists
 82:             if ($flyer->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($flyer->foto)) {
 83:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($flyer->foto);
 84:             }
 85: 
 86:             // Store new file
 87:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('flyer', 'public');
 88:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
 89:         }
 90: 
 91:         // Maintain existing fields
 92:         $validated['tipe'] = 'image';
 93:         $validated['url'] = $flyer->url ?? 'https://example.com/flyers/' . time();
 94:         $validated['tahun'] = $flyer->tahun ?? now()->year;
 95: 
 96:         $flyer->update($validated);
 97: 
 98:         return redirect()->route('admin.flyer.index')
 99:             ->with('success', 'Flyer berhasil diperbarui!');
100:     }
101: 
102:     public function delete($id)
103:     {
104:         $flyer = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer')
105:             ->findOrFail($id);
106:         
107:         // Delete file if exists
108:         if ($flyer->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($flyer->foto)) {
109:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($flyer->foto);
110:         }
111:         
112:         $flyer->delete();
113: 
114:         return redirect()->route('admin.flyer.index')
115:             ->with('success', 'Flyer berhasil dihapus!');
116:     }
117: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/HasilSurveyBrandController.php

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request; // Keep if any method might need it in future
 7: 
 8: class HasilSurveyBrandController extends Controller
 9: {

33:

21:

23:             ->orWhere('kesimpulan', 'like', "%{$search}%")
24:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
25:             ->paginate(10);

39:             'kesimpulan' => 'required|string|max:1000',

61:             'link' => 'required|url|max:255'
62:         ]);
63:

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/PhotoController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  7: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  9: 
 10: class PhotoController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $photos = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_foto')
 15:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 16:             ->paginate(9);
 17:         return view('admin.pictures.photo.index', compact('photos'));
 18:     }
 19: 
 20:     public function search(Request $request)
 21:     {
 22:         $search = $request->get('search');
 23:         
 24:         $photos = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_foto')
 25:             ->where(function($query) use ($search) {
 26:                 $query->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
 27:                     ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', "%{$search}%");
 28:             })
 29:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 30:             ->paginate(9);
 31: 
 32:         return view('admin.pictures.photo.index', compact('photos'));
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     public function create()
 36:     {
 37:         return view('admin.pictures.photo.create');
 38:     }
 39: 
 40:     public function store(Request $request)
 41:     {
 42:         $validated = $request->validate([
 43:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 44:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048',
 45:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000'
 46:         ]);
 47: 
 48:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 49:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('photo/images', 'public');
 50:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
 51:         }
 52: 
 53:         // Add additional fields
 54:         $validated['kategori'] = 'dokum_foto';
 55:         $validated['tipe'] = 'image';
 56:         $validated['url'] = 'https://example.com/photos/' . time(); // Random URL
 57: 
 58:         ProdukModel::create($validated);
 59: 
 60:         return redirect()->route('admin.photo.index')
 61:             ->with('success', 'Foto berhasil ditambahkan!');
 62:     }
 63: 
 64:     public function edit($id)
 65:     {
 66:         $photo = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_foto')
 67:             ->findOrFail($id);
 68:         return view('admin.pictures.photo.edit', compact('photo'));
 69:     }
 70: 
 71:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 72:     {
 73:         $photo = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_foto')
 74:             ->findOrFail($id);
 75:         
 76:         $validated = $request->validate([
 77:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 78:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048',
 79:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000'
 80:         ]);
 81: 
 82:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 83:             // Delete old file if exists
 84:             if ($photo->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($photo->foto)) {
 85:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($photo->foto);
 86:             }
 87: 
 88:             // Store new file in correct path
 89:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('photo/images', 'public');
 90:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
 91:         }
 92: 
 93:         // Maintain existing fields
 94:         $validated['tipe'] = 'image';
 95:         $validated['url'] = $photo->url ?? 'https://example.com/photos/' . time();
 96: 
 97:         $photo->update($validated);
 98: 
 99:         return redirect()->route('admin.photo.index')
100:             ->with('success', 'Foto berhasil diperbarui!');
101:     }
102: 
103:     public function delete($id)
104:     {
105:         $photo = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_foto')
106:             ->findOrFail($id);
107:         
108:         // Delete file if exists
109:         if ($photo->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($photo->foto)) {
110:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($photo->foto);
111:         }
112:         
113:         $photo->delete();
114: 
115:         return redirect()->route('admin.photo.index')
116:             ->with('success', 'Foto berhasil dihapus!');
117:     }
118: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/PresentasiController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  9: 
 10: class PresentasiController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $presentasi = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'template_presentasi')->paginate(9);
 15:         return view('admin.references.presentasi.index', compact('presentasi'));
 16:     }
 17:     
 18:     public function create()
 19:     {
 20:         return view('admin.references.presentasi.create');
 21:     }
 22:     
 23:     public function store(Request $request)
 24:     {
 25:         $request->validate([
 26:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 27:             'url' => 'required|file', // Max 10MB
 28:         ]);
 29:         
 30:         // Handle file upload
 31:         $originalName = $request->file('url')->getClientOriginalName();
 32:         $filePath = $request->file('url')->storeAs('template_presentasi', $originalName, 'public');
 33:         
 34:         // Determine file type
 35:         $fileExtension = $request->file('url')->getClientOriginalExtension();
 36:         $tipe = in_array($fileExtension, ['ppt', 'pptx']) ? $fileExtension : 'pdf';
 37:         
 38:         // Create new record with default values for required fields
 39:         ProdukModel::create([
 40:             'nama' => $request->nama,
 41:             'url' => $filePath,
 42:             'deskripsi' => 'Template presentasi', // Default value
 43:             'foto' => 'default.jpg', // Default value
 44:             'tahun' => date('Y'), // Current year as default
 45:             'tipe' => $tipe,
 46:             'kategori' => 'template_presentasi',
 47:         ]);
 48:         
 49:         return redirect()->route('admin.presentasi.index')
 50:             ->with('success', 'Template presentasi berhasil ditambahkan!');
 51:     }
 52: 
 53:     public function edit($id)
 54:     {
 55:         $presentasi = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 56:         return view('admin.references.presentasi.edit', compact('presentasi'));
 57:     }
 58: 
 59:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 60:     {
 61:         $request->validate([
 62:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 63:             'url' => 'nullable|file', 
 64:         ]);
 65:     
 66:         $presentasi = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 67:     
 68:         $presentasi->nama = $request->nama;
 69:     
 70:         if ($request->hasFile('url')) {
 71:             if ($presentasi->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($presentasi->url)) {
 72:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($presentasi->url);
 73:             }
 74:     
 75:             $originalName = $request->file('url')->getClientOriginalName();
 76:             $filePath = $request->file('url')->storeAs('template_presentasi', $originalName, 'public');
 77:             $presentasi->url = $filePath;
 78:     
 79:             $fileExtension = $request->file('url')->getClientOriginalExtension();
 80:             $presentasi->tipe = in_array($fileExtension, ['ppt', 'pptx']) ? $fileExtension : 'pdf';
 81:         }
 82:     
 83:         $presentasi->save();
 84:     
 85:         return redirect()->route('admin.presentasi.index')
 86:             ->with('success', 'Template presentasi berhasil diperbarui!');
 87:     }
 88:     
 89:     
 90:     public function delete($id)
 91:     {
 92:         $presentasi = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 93:     
 94:         // Delete associated files
 95:         if ($presentasi->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($presentasi->url)) {
 96:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($presentasi->url);
 97:         }
 98:     
 99:         $presentasi->delete();
100:     
101:         return redirect()->route('admin.presentasi.index')
102:             ->with('success', 'Template presentasi berhasil dihapus!');
103:     }
104:     
105:     public function search(Request $request)
106:     {
107:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
108:         
109:         $presentasi = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'template_presentasi')
110:             ->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
111:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'asc')
112:             ->paginate(9);
113:         
114:         return view('admin.references.presentasi.index', compact('presentasi'));
115:     }
116: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/ProfileController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
 4: 
 5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
 9: use App\Models\UserModel;
10: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
11: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
12: 
13: class ProfileController extends Controller
14: {
15:     public function edit()
16:     {
17:         return view('admin.profile.edit', [
18:             'user' => Auth::user()
19:         ]);
20:     }
21: 
22:     public function update(Request $request)
23:     {
24:         $user = Auth::user();
25: 
26:         $validated = $request->validate([
27:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
28:             'email' => 'required|email|unique:user,email,'.$user->id_user.',id_user',
29:             'unit' => 'required|string|max:255',
30:             'npk' => 'required|string|max:255',
31:             'divisi' => 'required|string|max:255',
32:             'telepon' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
33:             'alamat' => 'nullable|string',
34:             'tanggal_lahir' => 'required|date',
35:             'current_password' => 'required_with:new_password',
36:             'new_password' => 'nullable|min:8|confirmed',
37:             'image' => ['nullable', 'image', 'mimes:jpeg,png,jpg', 'max:2048'],
38:         ]);
39: 
40:          $userData = $request->only([
41:             'nama', 
42:             'email', 
43:             'npk', 
44:             'unit', 
45:             'divisi', 
46:             'telepon', 
47:             'tanggal_lahir', 
48:             'alamat'
49:         ]);
50: 
51:         if ($request->filled('npk')) {
52:             if ($user->npk !== $request->npk || !$user->password) {
53:                 $userData['password'] = Hash::make($request->npk);
54:             }
55:         }
56: 
57: 
58:         if ($request->hasFile('image')) {
59:             if ($user->image_url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($user->image_url)) {
60:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($user->image_url);
61:             }
62:             $path = $request->file('image')->store('profile', 'public');
63:             $userData['image_url'] = $path;
64:         }
65: 
66:         $user->update($userData);
67: 
68:         return redirect()->route('admin.profile.edit')->with('success', 'Profil berhasil diperbarui.');
69:     }
70: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/SurveyDocumentController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage; // Still useful for checking existence, but move for storage.
  9: use Illuminate\Support\Str; // For generating unique filenames
 10: 
 11: class SurveyDocumentController extends Controller
 12: {
 13:     protected $kategori = 'survey_hasil'; // Category for these documents
 14:     protected $thumbnailPath = 'survey_documents/images'; // Relative to public/files/
 15:     protected $pdfPath = 'survey_documents/pdf';       // Relative to public/files/
 16: 
 17:     public function index(Request $request)
 18:     {
 19:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', $this->kategori)->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
 20: 
 21:         if ($request->has('search')) {
 22:             $searchTerm = $request->input('search');
 23:             $query->where(function ($q) use ($searchTerm) {
 24:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%")
 25:                   ->orWhere('tahun', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%")
 26:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%");
 27:             });
 28:         }
 29:         $documents = $query->paginate(10);
 30:         return view('admin.references.survey_documents.index', compact('documents'));
 31:     }
 32: 
 33:     public function create()
 34:     {
 35:         return view('admin.references.survey_documents.create');
 36:     }
 37: 
 38:     public function store(Request $request)
 39:     {
 40:         $validated = $request->validate([
 41:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 42:             'tahun' => 'nullable|numeric|min:2000|max:2100',
 43:             'deskripsi' => 'nullable|string|max:1000',
 44:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg|max:2048', // Thumbnail
 45:             'file' => 'required|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240' // PDF document
 46:         ]);
 47: 
 48:         $validated['kategori'] = $this->kategori;
 49:         $validated['tipe'] = 'pdf'; // Or 'survey_document'
 50: 
 51:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 52:             $file = $request->file('foto');
 53:             $filename = Str::uuid() . '.' . $file->getClientOriginalExtension();
 54:             $file->move(public_path('files/' . $this->thumbnailPath), $filename);
 55:             $validated['foto'] = $this->thumbnailPath . '/' . $filename;
 56:         }
 57: 
 58:         if ($request->hasFile('file')) {
 59:             $file = $request->file('file');
 60:             $filename = Str::uuid() . '.' . $file->getClientOriginalExtension();
 61:             $file->move(public_path('files/' . $this->pdfPath), $filename);
 62:             $validated['url'] = $this->pdfPath . '/' . $filename;
 63:         }
 64: 
 65:         ProdukModel::create($validated);
 66: 
 67:         return redirect()->route('admin.survey-documents.index')->with('success', 'Survey document uploaded successfully.');
 68:     }
 69: 
 70:     public function edit($id)
 71:     {
 72:         $document = ProdukModel::where('kategori', $this->kategori)->findOrFail($id);
 73:         return view('admin.references.survey_documents.edit', compact('document'));
 74:     }
 75: 
 76:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 77:     {
 78:         $document = ProdukModel::where('kategori', $this->kategori)->findOrFail($id);
 79:         
 80:         $validated = $request->validate([
 81:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 82:             'tahun' => 'nullable|numeric|min:2000|max:2100',
 83:             'deskripsi' => 'nullable|string|max:1000',
 84:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg|max:2048',
 85:             'file' => 'nullable|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240'
 86:         ]);
 87: 
 88:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 89:             // Delete old photo if exists
 90:             if ($document->foto && file_exists(public_path('files/' . $document->foto))) {
 91:                 unlink(public_path('files/' . $document->foto));
 92:             }
 93:             $file = $request->file('foto');
 94:             $filename = Str::uuid() . '.' . $file->getClientOriginalExtension();
 95:             $file->move(public_path('files/' . $this->thumbnailPath), $filename);
 96:             $validated['foto'] = $this->thumbnailPath . '/' . $filename;
 97:         }
 98: 
 99:         if ($request->hasFile('file')) {
100:             // Delete old file if exists
101:             if ($document->url && file_exists(public_path('files/' . $document->url))) {
102:                 unlink(public_path('files/' . $document->url));
103:             }
104:             $file = $request->file('file');
105:             $filename = Str::uuid() . '.' . $file->getClientOriginalExtension();
106:             $file->move(public_path('files/' . $this->pdfPath), $filename);
107:             $validated['url'] = $this->pdfPath . '/' . $filename;
108:         }
109: 
110:         $document->update($validated);
111: 
112:         return redirect()->route('admin.survey-documents.index')->with('success', 'Survey document updated successfully.');
113:     }
114: 
115:     public function destroy($id)
116:     {
117:         $document = ProdukModel::where('kategori', $this->kategori)->findOrFail($id);
118: 
119:         if ($document->foto && file_exists(public_path('files/' . $document->foto))) {
120:             unlink(public_path('files/' . $document->foto));
121:         }
122:         if ($document->url && file_exists(public_path('files/' . $document->url))) {
123:             unlink(public_path('files/' . $document->url));
124:         }
125: 
126:         $document->delete();
127: 
128:         return redirect()->route('admin.survey-documents.index')->with('success', 'Survey document deleted successfully.');
129:     }
130: 
131:     public function download($id)
132:     {
133:         $document = ProdukModel::where('kategori', $this->kategori)->findOrFail($id);
134:         $filePath = public_path('files/' . $document->url);
135: 
136:         if (file_exists($filePath)) {
137:             // Use original name for download if available and sensible, or generate one
138:             $originalName = Str::slug($document->nama ?? 'survey-document') . '.pdf';
139:             return response()->download($filePath, $originalName);
140:         } else {
141:             return redirect()->back()->with('error', 'File not found.');
142:         }
143:     }
144: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/SustainController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  9: 
 10: class SustainController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $sustainReports = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'laporanS')->paginate(9);
 15:         return view('admin.references.report.sustain.index', compact('sustainReports'));
 16:     }
 17:     
 18:     public function create()
 19:     {
 20:         return view('admin.references.report.sustain.create');
 21:     }
 22:     
 23:     public function store(Request $request)
 24:     {
 25:         $request->validate([
 26:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 27:             'tahun' => 'required|integer|min:1900|max:' . date('Y'), // validasi tahun
 28:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string',
 29:             'url' => 'required|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240', // Max 10MB
 30:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Max 2MB
 31:         ]);
 32:         
 33:         // Handle file uploads dengan menyimpan nama original
 34:         $pdfFile = $request->file('url');
 35:         $pdfOriginalName = $pdfFile->getClientOriginalName();
 36:         $pdfPath = $pdfFile->storeAs('sustain/pdf', $pdfOriginalName, 'public');
 37:         
 38:         $fotoFile = $request->file('foto');
 39:         $fotoOriginalName = $fotoFile->getClientOriginalName();
 40:         $fotoPath = $fotoFile->storeAs('sustain/images', $fotoOriginalName, 'public');
 41:         
 42:         // Create new record
 43:         ProdukModel::create([
 44:             'nama' => $request->nama,
 45:             'url' => $pdfPath,
 46:             'deskripsi' => $request->deskripsi,
 47:             'foto' => $fotoPath,
 48:             'tahun' => $request->tahun,
 49:             'tipe' => 'pdf',
 50:             'kategori' => 'laporanS',
 51:         ]);
 52:         
 53:         return redirect()->route('admin.sustain.index')
 54:             ->with('success', 'Laporan tahunan berhasil ditambahkan!');
 55:     }
 56: 
 57:     public function show($id)
 58:     {
 59:         $sustainReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 60:         return view('admin.references.report.sustain.show', compact('sustainReport'));
 61:     }
 62: 
 63:     public function edit($id)
 64:     {
 65:         $sustainReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 66: 
 67:         return view('admin.references.report.sustain.edit', compact('sustainReport'));
 68:     }
 69: 
 70:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 71:     {
 72:         $request->validate([
 73:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 74:             'tahun' => 'required|integer|min:1900|max:' . date('Y'), // validasi tahun
 75:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1024',
 76:             'url' => 'nullable|file|mimes:pdf|max:10240', // Optional saat edit
 77:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Optional saat edit
 78:         ]);
 79:     
 80:         $sustainReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 81:     
 82:         // Update file if new file is uploaded (dengan nama original)
 83:         if ($request->hasFile('url')) {
 84:             if ($sustainReport->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($sustainReport->url)) {
 85:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($sustainReport->url);
 86:             }
 87:             $pdfFile = $request->file('url');
 88:             $pdfOriginalName = $pdfFile->getClientOriginalName();
 89:             $pdfPath = $pdfFile->storeAs('sustain/pdf', $pdfOriginalName, 'public');
 90:             $sustainReport->url = $pdfPath;
 91:         }
 92:     
 93:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 94:             if ($sustainReport->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($sustainReport->foto)) {
 95:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($sustainReport->foto);
 96:             }
 97:             $fotoFile = $request->file('foto');
 98:             $fotoOriginalName = $fotoFile->getClientOriginalName();
 99:             $fotoPath = $fotoFile->storeAs('sustain/images', $fotoOriginalName, 'public');
100:             $sustainReport->foto = $fotoPath;
101:         }
102:     
103:         // Update other fields
104:         $sustainReport->nama = $request->nama;
105:         $sustainReport->deskripsi = $request->deskripsi;
106:         $sustainReport->tahun = $request->tahun;
107:         $sustainReport->save();
108:     
109:         return redirect()->route('admin.sustain.index')
110:             ->with('success', 'Laporan tahunan berhasil diperbarui!');
111:     }
112:     
113:     public function delete($id)
114:     {
115:         $sustainReport = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
116:     
117:         // Hapus file jika ada
118:         if ($sustainReport->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($sustainReport->url)) {
119:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($sustainReport->url);
120:         }
121:     
122:         if ($sustainReport->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($sustainReport->foto)) {
123:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($sustainReport->foto);
124:         }
125:     
126:         $sustainReport->delete();
127:     
128:         return redirect()->route('admin.sustain.index')
129:             ->with('success', 'Laporan tahunan berhasil dihapus!');
130:     }
131:     
132:     public function search(Request $request)
133:     {
134:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
135:         
136:         $sustainReports = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'laporanS')
137:             ->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
138:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
139:             ->paginate(9);
140:         
141:         return view('admin.references.report.sustain.index', compact('sustainReports'));
142:     }
143: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/TwibbonController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  7: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  9: 
 10: class TwibbonController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $twibbons = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')
 15:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 16:             ->paginate(9);
 17:         return view('admin.pictures.twibbon.index', compact('twibbons'));
 18:     }
 19: 
 20:     public function search(Request $request)
 21:     {
 22:         $search = $request->get('search');
 23:         
 24:         $twibbons = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')
 25:             ->where(function($query) use ($search) {
 26:                 $query->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
 27:                     ->orWhere('url', 'like', "%{$search}%");
 28:             })
 29:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 30:             ->paginate(9);
 31: 
 32:         return view('admin.pictures.twibbon.index', compact('twibbons'));
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     public function create()
 36:     {
 37:         return view('admin.pictures.twibbon.create');
 38:     }
 39: 
 40:     public function store(Request $request)
 41:     {
 42:         $validated = $request->validate([
 43:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 44:             'foto' => 'required|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048', // Added gif support, 2MB limit
 45:             'url' => 'nullable|url|max:255',
 46:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000'
 47:         ]);
 48: 
 49:         $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('twibbon/images', 'public');
 50:         $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath; // Store full path
 51: 
 52:         // Add additional fields
 53:         $validated['kategori'] = 'twibbon';
 54:         $validated['tipe'] = 'image';
 55: 
 56:         ProdukModel::create($validated);
 57: 
 58:         return redirect()->route('admin.twibbon.index')
 59:             ->with('success', 'Twibbon berhasil ditambahkan!');
 60:     }
 61: 
 62:     public function show($id)
 63:     {
 64:         $twibbon = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')
 65:             ->findOrFail($id);
 66:         return view('admin.pictures.twibbon.show', compact('twibbon'));
 67:     }
 68: 
 69:     public function edit($id)
 70:     {
 71:         $twibbon = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')
 72:             ->findOrFail($id);
 73:         return view('admin.pictures.twibbon.edit', compact('twibbon'));
 74:     }
 75: 
 76:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 77:     {
 78:         $twibbon = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')
 79:             ->findOrFail($id);
 80:         
 81:         $validated = $request->validate([
 82:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 83:             'foto' => 'nullable|image|mimes:jpeg,png,jpg,gif|max:2048',
 84:             'url' => 'nullable|url|max:255',
 85:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000'
 86:         ]);
 87: 
 88:         if ($request->hasFile('foto')) {
 89:             // Delete old file if exists
 90:             if ($twibbon->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($twibbon->foto)) {
 91:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($twibbon->foto);
 92:             }
 93: 
 94:             // Store new file
 95:             $fotoPath = $request->file('foto')->store('twibbon/images', 'public');
 96:             $validated['foto'] = $fotoPath;
 97:         }
 98: 
 99:         // Maintain existing fields
100:         $validated['tipe'] = 'image';
101: 
102:         $twibbon->update($validated);
103: 
104:         return redirect()->route('admin.twibbon.index')
105:             ->with('success', 'Twibbon berhasil diperbarui!');
106:     }
107: 
108:     public function delete($id)
109:     {
110:         $twibbon = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'twibbon')
111:             ->findOrFail($id);
112:         
113:         // Delete file if exists using Storage facade
114:         if ($twibbon->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($twibbon->foto)) {
115:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($twibbon->foto);
116:         }
117:         
118:         $twibbon->delete();
119: 
120:         return redirect()->route('admin.twibbon.index')
121:             ->with('success', 'Twibbon berhasil dihapus!');
122:     }
123: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/Admin/UserController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use App\Models\UserModel; // Changed from User to UserModel
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
  9: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 10: use Illuminate\Validation\Rule;
 11: 
 12: class UserController extends Controller
 13: {
 14:     public function index(Request $request)
 15:     {
 16:         $query = UserModel::query(); // Changed from User to UserModel
 17: 
 18:         if ($request->has('search')) {
 19:             $searchTerm = $request->input('search');
 20:             $query->where(function ($q) use ($searchTerm) {
 21:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%")
 22:                   ->orWhere('email', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%")
 23:                   ->orWhere('unit', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%")
 24:                   ->orWhere('npk', 'like', "%{$searchTerm}%");
 25:             });
 26:         }
 27: 
 28:         $users = $query->paginate(10);
 29:         return view('admin.users.index', compact('users'));
 30:     }
 31: 
 32:     public function create()
 33:     {
 34:         return view('admin.users.create');
 35:     }
 36: 
 37:     public function store(Request $request)
 38:     {
 39:         $request->validate([
 40:             'nama' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
 41:             'email' => ['required', 'string', 'email', 'max:255', Rule::unique('user', 'email')], // Table 'user' from UserModel
 42:             'npk' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255', Rule::unique('user', 'npk')], // NPK is required and unique, table 'user'
 43:             'unit' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
 44:             'divisi' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
 45:             'telepon' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:20'],
 46:             'tanggal_lahir' => ['nullable', 'date'],
 47:             'alamat' => ['nullable', 'string'],
 48:             'role' => ['required', Rule::in(['userb', 'userk', 'admin'])],
 49:             'image' => ['nullable', 'image', 'mimes:jpeg,png,jpg', 'max:2048'],
 50:         ]);
 51: 
 52:         $userData = $request->only(['nama', 'email', 'npk', 'unit', 'divisi', 'telepon', 'tanggal_lahir', 'alamat', 'role']);
 53:         //dd($request);
 54:         $userData['password'] = Hash::make($request->npk); // Password is Hash of NPK
 55: 
 56:         if ($request->hasFile('image')) {
 57:             $path = $request->file('image')->store('profile', 'public');
 58:             $userData['image_url'] = $path;
 59:         }
 60: 
 61:         //dd($userData);
 62:         UserModel::create($userData); // Changed from User to UserModel
 63: 
 64:         return redirect()->route('admin.users.index')->with('success', 'User created successfully.');
 65:     }
 66: 
 67:     public function show(UserModel $user) // Changed from User to UserModel
 68:     {
 69:         return view('admin.users.show', compact('user'));
 70:     }
 71: 
 72:     public function edit(UserModel $user) // Changed from User to UserModel
 73:     {
 74:         return view('admin.users.edit', compact('user'));
 75:     }
 76: 
 77:     public function update(Request $request, UserModel $user) // Changed from User to UserModel
 78:     {
 79:         $request->validate([
 80:             'nama' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'],
 81:             'email' => ['required', 'string', 'email', 'max:255', Rule::unique('user', 'email')->ignore($user->id_user, 'id_user')], // Table 'user', pk 'id_user' from UserModel
 82:             'npk' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255', Rule::unique('user', 'npk')->ignore($user->id_user, 'id_user')], // NPK is required and unique
 83:             'unit' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
 84:             'divisi' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:255'],
 85:             'telepon' => ['nullable', 'string', 'max:20'],
 86:             'tanggal_lahir' => ['nullable', 'date'],
 87:             'alamat' => ['nullable', 'string'],
 88:             'role' => ['required', Rule::in(['userb', 'userk', 'admin'])],
 89:             'image' => ['nullable', 'image', 'mimes:jpeg,png,jpg', 'max:2048'],
 90:         ]);
 91: 
 92:         $userData = $request->only(['nama', 'email', 'npk', 'unit', 'divisi', 'telepon', 'tanggal_lahir', 'alamat', 'role']);
 93: 
 94:         // If NPK is being updated or was empty and is now filled, update the password
 95:         if ($request->filled('npk')) {
 96:             if ($user->npk !== $request->npk || !$user->password) {
 97:                 $userData['password'] = Hash::make($request->npk);
 98:             }
 99:         }
100: 
101:         if ($request->hasFile('image')) {
102:             if ($user->image_url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($user->image_url)) {
103:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($user->image_url);
104:             }
105:             $path = $request->file('image')->store('profile', 'public');
106:             $userData['image_url'] = $path;
107:         }
108: 
109:         $user->update($userData);
110: 
111:         return redirect()->route('admin.users.index')->with('success', 'User updated successfully.');
112:     }
113: 
114:     public function destroy(UserModel $user) // Changed from User to UserModel
115:     {
116:         if ($user->image_url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($user->image_url)) {
117:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($user->image_url);
118:         }
119:         $user->delete();
120:         return redirect()->route('admin.users.index')->with('success', 'User deleted successfully.');
121:     }
122: }

================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\admin;
  4: 
  5: use App\Http\Controllers\Controller;
  6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  7: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  9: 
 10: class VideoController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $videos = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_video')
 15:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 16:             ->paginate(9);
 17:         return view('admin.pictures.video.index', compact('videos'));
 18:     }
 19: 
 20:     public function search(Request $request)
 21:     {
 22:         $search = $request->get('search');
 23:         
 24:         $videos = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_video')
 25:             ->where(function($query) use ($search) {
 26:                 $query->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
 27:                     ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', "%{$search}%");
 28:             })
 29:             ->orderBy('created_at', 'desc')
 30:             ->paginate(9);
 31: 
 32:         return view('admin.pictures.video.index', compact('videos'));
 33:     }
 34: 
 35:     public function create()
 36:     {
 37:         return view('admin.pictures.video.create');
 38:     }
 39: 
 40:     public function store(Request $request)
 41:     {
 42:         $validated = $request->validate([
 43:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 44:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000',
 45:             'video' => 'required|mimes:mp4,mov,avi|max:102400' // 100MB max
 46:         ]);
 47: 
 48:         if ($request->hasFile('video')) {
 49:             $videoPath = $request->file('video')->store('vid', 'public');
 50:             $validated['foto'] = $videoPath; // Using 'foto' field for video path
 51:         }
 52: 
 53:         // Add additional fields
 54:         $validated['kategori'] = 'dokum_video';
 55:         $validated['tipe'] = 'video';
 56:         $validated['url'] = 'https://example.com/videos/' . time(); // Random URL
 57: 
 58:         ProdukModel::create($validated);
 59: 
 60:         return redirect()
 61:             ->route('admin.video.index')
 62:             ->with('success', 'Video berhasil ditambahkan!');
 63:     }
 64: 
 65:     public function edit($id)
 66:     {
 67:         $video = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_video')
 68:             ->findOrFail($id);
 69:         return view('admin.pictures.video.edit', compact('video'));
 70:     }
 71: 
 72:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 73:     {
 74:         $video = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_video')
 75:             ->findOrFail($id);
 76:         
 77:         $validated = $request->validate([
 78:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 79:             'deskripsi' => 'required|string|max:1000',
 80:             'video' => 'nullable|mimes:mp4,mov,avi|max:102400' // 100MB max
 81:         ]);
 82: 
 83:         if ($request->hasFile('video')) {
 84:             // Delete old file if exists
 85:             if ($video->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($video->foto)) {
 86:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($video->foto);
 87:             }
 88: 
 89:             // Store new file
 90:             $videoPath = $request->file('video')->store('vid', 'public');
 91:             $validated['foto'] = $videoPath;
 92:         }
 93: 
 94:         // Maintain existing fields
 95:         $validated['tipe'] = 'video';
 96:         $validated['kategori'] = 'dokum_video';
 97:         $validated['url'] = $video->url ?? 'https://example.com/videos/' . time();
 98: 
 99:         $video->update($validated);
100: 
101:         return redirect()
102:             ->route('admin.video.index')
103:             ->with('success', 'Video berhasil diperbarui!');
104:     }
105: 
106:     public function delete($id)
107:     {
108:         $video = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_video')
109:             ->findOrFail($id);
110:         
111:         // Delete file if exists
112:         if ($video->foto && Storage::disk('public')->exists($video->foto)) {
113:             Storage::disk('public')->delete($video->foto);
114:         }
115:         
116:         $video->delete();
117: 
118:         return redirect()
119:             ->route('admin.video.index')
120:             ->with('success', 'Video berhasil dihapus!');
121:     }
122: }

  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers\Admin;
  4:

  6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  9: 
 10: class ZoomBackgroundController extends Controller
 11: {
 12:     public function index()
 13:     {
 14:         $backgrounds = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'zoom_background')->paginate(9);
 15:         return view('admin.pictures.background-zoom.index', compact('backgrounds'));
 16:     }
 17: 
 18:     public function create()
 19:     {
 20:         return view('admin.pictures.background-zoom.create');
 21:     }
 22: 
 23:     public function store(Request $request)
 24:     {
 25:         $request->validate([
 26:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 27:             'url' => 'required|file|mimes:jpg,jpeg,png', // Validasi file gambar
 28:         ]);
 29: 
 30:         $originalName = $request->file('url')->getClientOriginalName();
 31:         $filePath = $request->file('url')->storeAs('zoom_background', $originalName, 'public');
 32: 
 33: 
 34:         ProdukModel::create([
 35:             'nama' => $request->nama,
 36:             'url' => $filePath,
 37:             'deskripsi' => 'Background Zoom', // Default
 38:             'foto' => $filePath, // Default
 39:             'tahun' => date('Y'),
 40:             'tipe' => 'image',
 41:             'kategori' => 'zoom_background',
 42:         ]);
 43:

 45:             ->with('success', 'Background Zoom berhasil ditambahkan!');
 46:     }

 51:         return view('admin.pictures.background-zoom.edit', compact('background'));

 54:     public function update(Request $request, $id)
 55:     {
 56:         $request->validate([
 57:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
 58:             'url' => 'nullable|file|mimes:jpg,jpeg,png',
 59:         ]);
 60: 
 61:         $background = ProdukModel::findOrFail($id);
 62: 
 63:         $background->nama = $request->nama;
 64: 
 65:         if ($request->hasFile('url')) {
 66:             if ($background->url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($background->url)) {
 67:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($background->url);
 68:             }
 69: 
 70:             $originalName = $request->file('url')->getClientOriginalName();
 71:             $filePath = $request->file('url')->storeAs('zoom_background', $originalName, 'public');

 73:             $background->foto = $filePath;
 74:         }
 75: 
 76:         $background->save();
 77: 
 78:         return redirect()->route('admin.zoom-background.index')
 79:             ->with('success', 'Background Zoom berhasil diperbarui!');
 80:     }

 99:
