================
File: app/Http/Controllers/AgendaController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  4: 
  5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  6: use App\Models\Agenda;
  7: use Carbon\Carbon;
  8: 
  9: class AgendaController extends Controller
 10: {
 11:     public function grid(Request $request)
 12:     {
 13:         // Ambil bulan dan tahun dari request atau gunakan bulan saat ini
 14:         $month = $request->input('month', Carbon::now()->month);
 15:         $year = $request->input('year', Carbon::now()->year);
 16:         
 17:         // Ambil semua agenda untuk bulan tersebut
 18:         $agendas = Agenda::whereMonth('tanggal_mulai', $month)
 19:                         ->whereYear('tanggal_mulai', $year)
 20:                         ->orWhere(function($query) use ($month, $year) {
 21:                             $query->whereMonth('tanggal_deadline', $month)
 22:                                   ->whereYear('tanggal_deadline', $year);
 23:                         })
 24:                         ->get();
 25:         
 26:         // Buat kalender untuk bulan tersebut
 27:         $calendar = $this->generateCalendar($month, $year, $agendas);
 28:         
 29:         return view('pages.reference.agenda.grid', [
 30:             'calendar' => $calendar,
 31:             'currentMonth' => Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)->format('F Y'),
 32:             'month' => $month,
 33:             'year' => $year,
 34:             'agendas' => $agendas
 35:         ]);
 36:     }
 37:     
 38:     private function generateCalendar($month, $year, $agendas)
 39:     {
 40:         $daysInMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)->daysInMonth;
 41:         $firstDay = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)->dayOfWeek;
 42:         $firstDay = $firstDay === 0 ? 6 : $firstDay - 1; // Adjust so Monday is 0
 43:         
 44:         $calendar = [];
 45:         $dayCount = 1;
 46:         
 47:         // Hari dari bulan sebelumnya
 48:         $prevMonth = $month - 1 < 1 ? 12 : $month - 1;
 49:         $prevYear = $month - 1 < 1 ? $year - 1 : $year;
 50:         $daysInPrevMonth = Carbon::create($prevYear, $prevMonth, 1)->daysInMonth;
 51:         
 52:         // Hari dari bulan berikutnya
 53:         $nextMonth = $month + 1 > 12 ? 1 : $month + 1;
 54:         $nextYear = $month + 1 > 12 ? $year + 1 : $year;
 55:         
 56:         // Isi hari dari bulan sebelumnya
 57:         for ($i = 0; $i < $firstDay; $i++) {
 58:             $calendar[] = [
 59:                 'day' => $daysInPrevMonth - $firstDay + $i + 1,
 60:                 'month' => 'prev',
 61:                 'agendas' => [],
 62:                 'date' => Carbon::create($prevYear, $prevMonth, $daysInPrevMonth - $firstDay + $i + 1)->format('Y-m-d')
 63:             ];
 64:         }
 65:         
 66:         // Isi hari dari bulan ini
 67:         for ($day = 1; $day <= $daysInMonth; $day++) {
 68:             $date = Carbon::create($year, $month, $day)->format('Y-m-d');
 69:             $dayAgendas = $agendas->filter(function ($agenda) use ($date) {
 70:                 return Carbon::parse($agenda->tanggal_mulai)->format('Y-m-d') == $date || 
 71:                        Carbon::parse($agenda->tanggal_deadline)->format('Y-m-d') == $date;
 72:             });
 73:             
 74:             $calendar[] = [
 75:                 'day' => $day,
 76:                 'month' => 'current',
 77:                 'agendas' => $dayAgendas,
 78:                 'date' => $date
 79:             ];
 80:         }
 81:         
 82:         // Isi hari dari bulan berikutnya
 83:         $remainingDays = 42 - count($calendar); // 6 weeks x 7 days
 84:         for ($i = 1; $i <= $remainingDays; $i++) {
 85:             $calendar[] = [
 86:                 'day' => $i,
 87:                 'month' => 'next',
 88:                 'agendas' => [],
 89:                 'date' => Carbon::create($nextYear, $nextMonth, $i)->format('Y-m-d')
 90:             ];
 91:         }
 92:         
 93:         return array_chunk($calendar, 7); // Dibagi per minggu
 94:     }
 95: 
 96:     // public function list(Request $request)
 97:     // {
 98:     //     // Ambil bulan dan tahun dari request atau gunakan bulan saat ini
 99:     //     $month = $request->input('month', Carbon::now()->month);
100:     //     $year = $request->input('year', Carbon::now()->year);
101:         
102:     //     // Ambil semua agenda untuk bulan tersebut
103:     //     $agendas = Agenda::whereMonth('tanggal_mulai', $month)
104:     //                     ->whereYear('tanggal_mulai', $year)
105:     //                     ->orWhere(function($query) use ($month, $year) {
106:     //                         $query->whereMonth('tanggal_deadline', $month)
107:     //                             ->whereYear('tanggal_deadline', $year);
108:     //                     })
109:     //                     ->orderBy('tanggal_mulai')
110:     //                     ->get();
111:         
112:     //     return view('pages.reference.agenda.list', [
113:     //         'agendas' => $agendas,
114:     //         'month' => $month,
115:     //         'year' => $year
116:     //     ]);
117:     // }
118: 
119:     public function list(Request $request)
120:     {
121:         // Ambil bulan dan tahun dari request atau gunakan bulan saat ini
122:         $month = $request->input('month', Carbon::now()->month);
123:         $year = $request->input('year', Carbon::now()->year);
124:         
125:         // Ambil semua agenda untuk bulan tersebut
126:         $agendas = Agenda::whereMonth('tanggal_mulai', $month)
127:                         ->whereYear('tanggal_mulai', $year)
128:                         ->orWhere(function($query) use ($month, $year) {
129:                             $query->whereMonth('tanggal_deadline', $month)
130:                                 ->whereYear('tanggal_deadline', $year);
131:                         })
132:                         ->orderBy('tanggal_mulai')
133:                         ->get();
134:         
135:         // Generate all dates in the month
136:         $daysInMonth = Carbon::create($year, $month, 1)->daysInMonth;
137:         $allDates = [];
138:         
139:         for ($day = 1; $day <= $daysInMonth; $day++) {
140:             $currentDate = Carbon::create($year, $month, $day)->format('Y-m-d');
141:             
142:             // Filter agendas for this date
143:             $dayAgendas = $agendas->filter(function ($agenda) use ($currentDate) {
144:                 return Carbon::parse($agenda->tanggal_mulai)->format('Y-m-d') == $currentDate || 
145:                     Carbon::parse($agenda->tanggal_deadline)->format('Y-m-d') == $currentDate;
146:             });
147:             
148:             $allDates[] = [
149:                 'date' => Carbon::create($year, $month, $day),
150:                 'agendas' => $dayAgendas
151:             ];
152:         }
153:         
154:         return view('pages.reference.agenda.list', [
155:             'allDates' => $allDates,
156:             'month' => $month,
157:             'year' => $year,
158:             'agendas' => $agendas,
159:             'hasAgendas' => $agendas->count() > 0
160:         ]);
161:     }
162:         
163:     public function show(Request $request, $date = null)
164:     {
165:         // Use provided date or default to today
166:         $date = $date ?? Carbon::now()->format('Y-m-d');
167:         $selectedDate = Carbon::parse($date);
168:         
169:         // Fetch agendas for the selected date
170:         $agendas = Agenda::whereDate('tanggal_mulai', $date)
171:                         ->orWhere(function($query) use ($date) {
172:                             $query->whereDate('tanggal_deadline', $date);
173:                         })
174:                         ->get();
175:         
176:         return view('pages.reference.agenda.show', [
177:             'date' => $selectedDate,
178:             'agendas' => $agendas
179:         ]);
180:     }
181: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/AnnualController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
 7: 
 8: class AnnualController extends Controller
 9: {
10:     public function grid(Request $request)
11:     {
12:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'laporanA');
13:         
14:         // Search functionality
15:         if ($request->has('search')) {
16:             $search = $request->search;
17:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
18:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
19:                   ->orWhereYear('tahun', 'like', "%{$search}%");
20:             });
21:         }
22: 
23:         // Sort functionality
24:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'newest'); // default to newest
25:         if ($sort === 'oldest') {
26:             $query->orderBy('tahun', 'asc');
27:         } else {
28:             $query->orderBy('tahun', 'desc');
29:         }
30: 
31:         $annualReports = $query->paginate(12);
32:         return view('pages.reference.report.annual.grid', compact('annualReports'));
33:     }
34: 
35:     public function list(Request $request)
36:     {
37:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'laporanA');
38:         
39:         // Search functionality
40:         if ($request->has('search')) {
41:             $search = $request->search;
42:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
43:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
44:                   ->orWhereYear('tahun', 'like', "%{$search}%");
45:             });
46:         }
47: 
48:         // Sort functionality
49:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'newest'); // default to newest
50:         if ($sort === 'oldest') {
51:             $query->orderBy('tahun', 'asc');
52:         } else {
53:             $query->orderBy('tahun', 'desc');
54:         }
55: 
56:         $annualReports = $query->paginate(12);
57:         return view('pages.reference.report.annual.list', compact('annualReports'));
58:     }
59: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/AuthController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
 7: use App\Models\UserModel;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;
 9: 
10: class AuthController extends Controller
11: {
12:     // Menampilkan halaman login
13:     public function index()
14:     {
15:         return view('pages.auth.index');
16:     }
17: 
18:     // Proses login user
19:     public function login(Request $request)
20:     {
21:         $request->validate([
22:             'nama' => 'required',
23:             'npk' => 'required',
24:         ]);
25: 
26:         // Cari user berdasarkan nama dan NPK
27:         $user = UserModel::where('nama', $request->nama)
28:                 ->where('npk', $request->npk)
29:                 ->first();
30:         
31:         if ($user) {
32:             Log::info('User ditemukan: ', ['id' => $user->id_user, 'nama' => $user->nama]);
33:             Auth::login($user);
34:             
35:             if (Auth::check()) {
36:                 Log::info('Auth berhasil, user_id: ' . Auth::id());
37:                 
38:                 // Redirect berdasarkan role user
39:                 if ($user->role === 'admin') {
40:                     return redirect()->intended('/admin/dashboard')->with('success', 'Login berhasil!');
41:                 } else {
42:                     return redirect()->intended('/home')->with('success', 'Login berhasil!');
43:                 }
44:             } else {
45:                 Log::error('Auth gagal setelah login()');
46:                 return back()->with('error', 'Auth gagal, silakan coba lagi.');
47:             }
48:         }
49:         
50:         Log::warning('User tidak ditemukan: ', ['nama' => $request->nama]);
51:         return back()->withInput($request->only('nama'))->with('error', 'Nama atau NPK tidak valid.');
52:     }
53: 
54:     
55:     // Proses logout user
56:     public function logout(Request $request)
57:     {
58:         Auth::logout();
59:         $request->session()->invalidate();
60:         $request->session()->regenerateToken();
61:         return redirect('/login')->with('success', 'Anda telah berhasil logout.');
62:     }
63: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/BukuController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  4: 
  5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
  7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\File;
  8: 
  9: class BukuController extends Controller
 10: {
 11:     // Tambahkan konstanta untuk default pagination
 12:     const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_LIST = 12;
 13:     const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_GRID = 12;
 14: 
 15:     public function list(Request $request)
 16:     {
 17:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
 18:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
 19:         $books = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buku');
 20:         
 21:         // Tambahkan pencarian jika ada
 22:         if (!empty($search)) {
 23:             $books = $books->where(function($q) use ($search) {
 24:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
 25:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
 26:             });
 27:         }
 28:         
 29:         // Apply sorting based on the parameter
 30:         switch ($sort) {
 31:             case 'terlama':
 32:                 $books = $books->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
 33:                 break;
 34:             case 'a-z':
 35:                 $books = $books->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
 36:                 break;
 37:             case 'z-a':
 38:                 $books = $books->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
 39:                 break;
 40:             case 'terbaru':
 41:             default:
 42:                 $books = $books->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
 43:                 break;
 44:         }
 45:         
 46:         $books = $books->paginate(self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_LIST)->withQueryString();
 47:         
 48:         $this->processBookImages($books);
 49:         
 50:         // Simpan view type ke session
 51:         $request->session()->put('buku_view_type', 'list');
 52:         
 53:         return view('pages.reference.buku.list', compact('books', 'sort', 'search'));
 54:     }
 55:     
 56:     public function grid(Request $request)
 57:     {
 58:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
 59:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
 60:         $perPage = $request->get('perPage', self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_GRID);
 61:         
 62:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buku');
 63:         
 64:         // Tambahkan pencarian jika ada
 65:         if (!empty($search)) {
 66:             $query = $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
 67:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
 68:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
 69:             });
 70:         }
 71:         
 72:         // Apply sorting
 73:         switch ($sort) {
 74:             case 'terlama':
 75:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
 76:                 break;
 77:             case 'a-z':
 78:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
 79:                 break;
 80:             case 'z-a':
 81:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
 82:                 break;
 83:             case 'terbaru':
 84:             default:
 85:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
 86:                 break;
 87:         }
 88:         
 89:         $books = $query->paginate($perPage)->withQueryString();
 90:         
 91:         $this->processBookImages($books);
 92:         
 93:         // Simpan view type ke session
 94:         $request->session()->put('buku_view_type', 'grid');
 95:         // Simpan preferensi pagination ke session
 96:         $request->session()->put('buku_per_page', $perPage);
 97:         
 98:         return view('pages.reference.buku.grid', [
 99:             'books' => $books,
100:             'sort' => $sort,
101:             'search' => $search,
102:             'perPage' => $perPage
103:         ]);
104:     }
105:     
106:     public function search(Request $request)
107:     {
108:         $search = $request->get('search');
109:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
110:         $viewType = $request->get('view_type', $request->session()->get('buku_view_type', 'grid'));
111:         
112:         // Tentukan perPage berdasarkan view type
113:         $defaultPerPage = ($viewType == 'list') ? self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_LIST : self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_GRID;
114:         $perPage = $request->get('perPage', $request->session()->get('buku_per_page', $defaultPerPage));
115:         
116:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buku')
117:                     ->where(function($q) use ($search) {
118:                         $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
119:                           ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
120:                     });
121:         
122:         // Apply sorting
123:         switch ($sort) {
124:             case 'terlama':
125:                 $query = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
126:                 break;
127:             case 'a-z':
128:                 $query = $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
129:                 break;
130:             case 'z-a':
131:                 $query = $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
132:                 break;
133:             case 'terbaru':
134:             default:
135:                 $query = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
136:                 break;
137:         }
138:         
139:         $books = $query->paginate($perPage)->withQueryString();
140:         
141:         $this->processBookImages($books);
142:         
143:         if ($request->ajax()) {
144:             // Untuk request AJAX, tentukan partial yang akan dirender berdasarkan viewType
145:             $partial = ($viewType == 'list') ? 'pages.reference.buku.partials.book-list' : 'pages.reference.buku.partials.book-cards';
146:             
147:             return response()->json([
148:                 'books' => $books,
149:                 'html' => view($partial, compact('books', 'search', 'sort'))->render()
150:             ]);
151:         }
152:         
153:         // Arahkan ke view yang sesuai berdasarkan session atau parameter
154:         if ($viewType == 'list') {
155:             return view('pages.reference.buku.list', compact('books', 'search', 'sort'));
156:         } else {
157:             // Simpan preferensi pagination ke session untuk grid view
158:             $request->session()->put('buku_per_page', $perPage);
159:             return view('pages.reference.buku.grid', compact('books', 'search', 'sort', 'perPage'));
160:         }
161:     }
162:     
163:     private function processBookImages($books)
164:     {
165:         $fallbackImages = ['book-1.jpg', 'book-2.jpg', 'book-3.jpg', 'book-4.jpg'];
166:         
167:         foreach ($books as $book) {
168:             $imagePath = public_path('img/' . $book->foto);
169:             
170:             if (!File::exists($imagePath)) {
171:                 $randomIndex = array_rand($fallbackImages);
172:                 $book->display_image = $fallbackImages[$randomIndex];
173:             } else {
174:                 $book->display_image = $book->foto;
175:             }
176:         }
177:         
178:         return $books;
179:     }
180: }

 14:

 16:     {
 17:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
 18:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
 19:         $bulletins = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buletin');
 20:         
 21:         // Tambahkan pencarian jika ada
 22:         if (!empty($search)) {
 23:             $bulletins = $bulletins->where(function($q) use ($search) {
 24:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
 25:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
 26:             });
 27:         }
 28:         
 29:         // Apply sorting based on the parameter
 30:         switch ($sort) {
 31:             case 'terlama':
 32:                 $bulletins = $bulletins->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');

 35:                 $bulletins = $bulletins->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
 36:                 break;

 43:                 break;

106:     public function search(Request $request)
107:     {
108:         $search = $request->get('search');
109:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
110:         $viewType = $request->get('view_type', $request->session()->get('buletin_view_type', 'grid'));
111:         
112:         // Tentukan perPage berdasarkan view type
113:         $defaultPerPage = ($viewType == 'list') ? self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_LIST : self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE_GRID;
114:         $perPage = $request->get('perPage', $request->session()->get('buletin_per_page', $defaultPerPage));
115:         
116:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'buletin')
117:                     ->where(function($q) use ($search) {
118:                         $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
119:                           ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
120:                     });
121:         
122:         // Apply sorting
123:         switch ($sort) {
124:             case 'terlama':
125:                 $query = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
126:                 break;
127:             case 'a-z':
128:                 $query = $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
129:                 break;
130:             case 'z-a':
131:                 $query = $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
132:                 break;
133:             case 'terbaru':
134:             default:
135:                 $query = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
136:                 break;
137:         }
138:         
139:         $bulletins = $query->paginate($perPage)->withQueryString();
140:         
141:         $this->processBuletinImages($bulletins);
142:         
143:         if ($request->ajax()) {
144:             // Untuk request AJAX, tentukan partial yang akan dirender berdasarkan viewType
145:             $partial = ($viewType == 'list') ? 'pages.reference.buletin.partials.buletin-list' : 'pages.reference.buletin.partials.buletin-cards';
146:             
147:             return response()->json([
148:                 'bulletins' => $bulletins,
149:                 'html' => view($partial, compact('bulletins', 'search', 'sort'))->render()
150:             ]);
151:         }
152:         
153:         // Arahkan ke view yang sesuai berdasarkan session atau parameter
154:         if ($viewType == 'list') {
155:             return view('pages.reference.buletin.list', compact('bulletins', 'search', 'sort'));
156:         } else {
157:             // Simpan preferensi pagination ke session untuk grid view
158:             $request->session()->put('buletin_per_page', $perPage);
159:             return view('pages.reference.buletin.grid', compact('bulletins', 'search', 'sort', 'perPage'));
160:         }
161:     }
162:     
163:     private function processBuletinImages($bulletins)
164:     {
165:         $fallbackImages = ['book-1.jpg', 'book-2.jpg', 'book-3.jpg', 'book-4.jpg'];
166:         
167:         foreach ($bulletins as $buletin) {
168:             $imagePath = public_path('img/' . $buletin->foto);
169:             
170:             if (!File::exists($imagePath)) {
171:                 $randomIndex = array_rand($fallbackImages);
172:                 $buletin->display_image = $fallbackImages[$randomIndex];
173:             } else {
174:                 $buletin->display_image = $buletin->foto;
175:             }
176:         }
177:         
178:         return $bulletins;
179:     }
180: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/CRMController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\ClientData;
 7: use App\Models\CRM;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth;
 9: 
10: class CRMController extends Controller
11: {
12:     public function index()
13:     {
14:         $client_data = ClientData::with('user')->get();
15:         return view('pages.crm.data-client.index', compact('client_data'));
16:     }
17: 
18:     public function permohonan()
19:     {
20:         $crm = CRM::all();
21:         return view('pages.crm.permohonan.index', compact('crm'));
22:     }
23: 
24:     public function store(Request $request)
25:     {
26:         // Validate the form data
27:         $validatedData = $request->validate([
28:             'nama' => 'required|string|max:255',
29:             'npk' => 'required|string|max:255',
30:             'unit' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
31:             'divisi' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
32:             'email' => 'nullable|email|max:255',
33:             'telepon' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
34:             'alasan' => 'nullable|string|max:255',
35:         ]);
36: 
37:         $validatedData['id_user'] = Auth::id();
38: 
39:         // Insert the data into the crm table
40:         CRM::create($validatedData);
41: 
42:         // Redirect back with a success message
43:         return redirect()->route('crm.permohonan')->with('success', 'Permohonan akses CRM berhasil diajukan.');
44:     }
45: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/FlyerController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
 7: 
 8: class FlyerController extends Controller
 9: {
10:     // Default pagination constant
11:     const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE = 12;
12: 
13:     public function index(Request $request)
14:     {
15:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
16:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
17:         $perPage = $request->get('perPage', self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE);
18:         
19:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer');
20:         
21:         // Add search functionality if search parameter exists
22:         if (!empty($search)) {
23:             $query = $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
24:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
25:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
26:             });
27:         }
28:         
29:         // Apply sorting based on the parameter
30:         switch ($sort) {
31:             case 'terlama':
32:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
33:                 break;
34:             case 'a-z':
35:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
36:                 break;
37:             case 'z-a':
38:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
39:                 break;
40:             case 'terbaru':
41:             default:
42:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
43:                 break;
44:         }
45:         
46:         $flyers = $query->paginate($perPage)->withQueryString();
47:         
48:         return view('pages.picture.flyer-ucapan.index', [
49:             'flyers' => $flyers,
50:             'sort' => $sort,
51:             'search' => $search,
52:             'perPage' => $perPage
53:         ]);
54:     }
55:     
56:     public function search(Request $request)
57:     {
58:         $search = $request->get('search');
59:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
60:         $perPage = $request->get('perPage', self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE);
61:         
62:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'flyer')
63:                     ->where(function($q) use ($search) {
64:                         $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
65:                           ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
66:                     });
67:         
68:         // Apply sorting
69:         switch ($sort) {
70:             case 'terlama':
71:                 $query = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
72:                 break;
73:             case 'a-z':
74:                 $query = $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
75:                 break;
76:             case 'z-a':
77:                 $query = $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
78:                 break;
79:             case 'terbaru':
80:             default:
81:                 $query = $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
82:                 break;
83:         }
84:         
85:         $flyers = $query->paginate($perPage)->withQueryString();
86:         
87:         if ($request->ajax()) {
88:             return response()->json([
89:                 'flyers' => $flyers,
90:                 'html' => view('pages.picture.flyer-ucapan.partials.flyer-cards', compact('flyers', 'search', 'sort'))->render()
91:             ]);
92:         }
93:         
94:         return view('pages.picture.flyer-ucapan.index', compact('flyers', 'search', 'sort', 'perPage'));
95:     }
96: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/HasilSurveyController.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
  4: 
  5: use App\Models\ProdukModel; // Pastikan Anda menggunakan model yang sesuai
  6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\File;
  7: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
  8: 
  9: class HasilSurveyController extends Controller
 10: {
 11:     /**
 12:      * Konstanta untuk jumlah item per halaman.
 13:      */
 14:     private const DEFAULT_PER_PAGE = 12;
 15: 
 16:     public function awareness()
 17:     {
 18:         return view('pages.reference.hasil-survey.brand-awareness');
 19:     }
 20: 
 21:     public function position()
 22:     {
 23:         return view('pages.reference.hasil-survey.brand-position');
 24:     }
 25:     
 26:     public function cse()
 27:     {
 28:         return view('pages.reference.hasil-survey.cse');
 29:     }
 30:     
 31:     public function skl()
 32:     {
 33:         return view('pages.reference.hasil-survey.skl');
 34:     }
 35: 
 36:     public function testimoni()
 37:     {
 38:         return view('pages.reference.hasil-survey.testimoni');
 39:     }
 40: 
 41:     /**
 42:      * Menampilkan halaman daftar dokumen survey dengan fungsionalitas search & sort.
 43:      *
 44:      * @param  \Illuminate\Http\Request  $request
 45:      * @return \Illuminate\View\View
 46:      */
 47:     public function dokumen_survey(Request $request) // <-- Tambahkan 'Request $request' di sini
 48:     {
 49:         // Ambil parameter dari request atau gunakan nilai default
 50:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
 51:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
 52:         $perPage = $request->get('perPage', self::DEFAULT_PER_PAGE);
 53: 
 54:         // Query dasar untuk mengambil produk dengan kategori 'hasil_survey'
 55:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'hasil_survey');
 56: 
 57:         // Terapkan filter pencarian jika ada kata kunci
 58:         if (!empty($search)) {
 59:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
 60:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', '%' . $search . '%')
 61:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%' . $search . '%');
 62:             });
 63:         }
 64: 
 65:         // Terapkan logika pengurutan
 66:         switch ($sort) {
 67:             case 'terlama':
 68:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
 69:                 break;
 70:             case 'a-z':
 71:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
 72:                 break;
 73:             case 'z-a':
 74:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
 75:                 break;
 76:             case 'terbaru':
 77:             default:
 78:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
 79:                 break;
 80:         }
 81: 
 82:         // Ambil data dengan pagination dan sertakan query string
 83:         $dokumenSurveys = $query->paginate($perPage)->withQueryString();
 84: 
 85:         // Proses gambar untuk fallback jika file tidak ditemukan
 86:         $this->processDokumenImages($dokumenSurveys);
 87: 
 88:         // Kirim data ke view
 89:         // Pastikan path view 'pages.survey.dokumen_survey' sudah benar
 90:         return view('pages.reference.hasil-survey.dokumen_survey', [ 
 91:             'dokumenSurveys' => $dokumenSurveys,
 92:             'sort' => $sort,
 93:             'search' => $search,
 94:             'perPage' => $perPage
 95:         ]);
 96:     }
 97: 
 98:     /**
 99:      * Memproses gambar dokumen dan memberikan gambar fallback jika file asli tidak ada.
100:      *
101:      * @param  \Illuminate\Pagination\LengthAwarePaginator  $documents
102:      * @return void
103:      */
104:     private function processDokumenImages($documents)
105:     {
106:         // Daftar gambar fallback generik untuk dokumen
107:         $fallbackImages = ['doc_thumb_1.jpg', 'doc_thumb_2.jpg', 'doc_thumb_3.jpg', 'doc_thumb_4.jpg'];
108: 
109:         foreach ($documents as $document) {
110:             // Asumsikan path file gambar ada di public/files/
111:             $imagePath = public_path('files/' . $document->foto);
112:             
113:             // Periksa apakah file ada dan bukan direktori
114:             if (!File::exists($imagePath) || !is_file($imagePath)) {
115:                 // Jika file tidak ada, gunakan gambar fallback secara acak
116:                 $randomIndex = array_rand($fallbackImages);
117:                 // Asumsikan gambar fallback ada di public/img/fallbacks/
118:                 $document->display_image = 'fallbacks/' . $fallbackImages[$randomIndex]; 
119:             } else {
120:                 // Jika file ada, gunakan gambar asli
121:                 $document->display_image = $document->foto;
122:             }
123:         }
124:     }
125: }

File: app/Http/Controllers/PhotoController.php

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
 7: 
 8: class PhotoController extends Controller
 9: {
10:     public function index(Request $request)
11:     {
12:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_foto');
13:         
14:         // Search functionality
15:         if ($request->has('search')) {
16:             $search = $request->search;
17:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
18:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
19:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', "%{$search}%");
20:             });
21:         }
22: 
23:         // Sort functionality
24:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'newest');
25:         if ($sort === 'oldest') {
26:             $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
27:         } else {
28:             $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
29:         }
30: 
31:         $photos = $query->paginate(12);
32:         return view('pages.picture.dokumentasi.photo.index', compact('photos'));
33:     }
34: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/ProfileController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth; 
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Storage;
 8: 
 9: class ProfileController extends Controller
10: {
11:     public function edit()
12:     {
13:         return view('pages.profile.edit', [
14:             'user' => Auth::user() 
15:         ]);
16:     }
17: 
18:     public function update(Request $request)
19:     {
20:         $user = Auth::user();
21: 
22:         $request->validate([
23:             'image' => ['nullable', 'image', 'mimes:jpeg,png,jpg', 'max:2048'],
24:         ]);
25: 
26:         // 3. Proses pembaruan gambar jika ada file yang diunggah
27:         if ($request->hasFile('image')) {
28:             // Hapus foto lama dari storage jika ada
29:             if ($user->image_url && Storage::disk('public')->exists($user->image_url)) {
30:                 Storage::disk('public')->delete($user->image_url);
31:             }
32:             
33:             // Simpan foto baru
34:             $path = $request->file('image')->store('profile', 'public');
35: 
36:             // Gunakan method update() untuk keamanan dan konsistensi
37:             $user->update(['image_url' => $path]);
38:         }
39:         
40:         // 4. Redirect kembali dengan pesan sukses
41:         return redirect()->route('profile.edit')->with('status', 'Profil berhasil diperbarui!');
42:     }
43: 
44: }

19:                   ->orWhereYear('tahun', 'like', "%{$search}%");

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/TwibbonController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\DB;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
 8: use DOMDocument;
 9: use DOMXPath;
10: 
11: class TwibbonController extends Controller
12: {
13:     /**
14:      * Display a listing of the twibbons.
15:      */
16:     public function index(Request $request)
17:     {
18:         // Get search query if exists
19:         $search = $request->query('search');
20:         $sort = $request->query('sort', 'newest'); // Default sort by newest
21:         
22:         // Base query
23:         $query = DB::table('produk')->where('kategori', 'twibbon');
24:         
25:         // Apply search if provided
26:         if ($search) {
27:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
28:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
29:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', "%{$search}%");
30:             });
31:         }
32:         
33:         // Apply sorting
34:         switch ($sort) {
35:             case 'name_asc':
36:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
37:                 break;
38:             case 'name_desc':
39:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
40:                 break;
41:             case 'oldest':
42:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
43:                 break;
44:             default:
45:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc'); // newest first
46:                 break;
47:         }
48:         
49:         // Get twibbons
50:         $twibbons = $query->paginate(8);
51:         
52:         // Fetch preview images for each twibbon
53:         foreach ($twibbons as $twibbon) {
54:             $twibbon->preview_image = $this->getTwibbonPreviewImage($twibbon->url);
55:         }
56:         
57:         return view('pages.picture.twibbon.index', compact('twibbons', 'search', 'sort'));
58:     }
59:     
60:     /**
61:      * Get preview image from Twibbonize URL
62:      */
63:     private function getTwibbonPreviewImage($url)
64:     {
65:         try {
66:             // Try to fetch the page content
67:             $response = Http::get($url);
68:             
69:             if ($response->successful()) {
70:                 // Create DOM document and load HTML
71:                 $dom = new DOMDocument();
72:                 @$dom->loadHTML($response->body());
73:                 
74:                 $xpath = new DOMXPath($dom);
75:                 
76:                 // Look for meta og:image tag which usually contains preview image
77:                 $metaTags = $xpath->query('//meta[@property="og:image"]');
78:                 
79:                 if ($metaTags->length > 0) {
80:                     return $metaTags[0]->getAttribute('content');
81:                 }
82:                 
83:                 // Alternative: try to find the main image in the page
84:                 $images = $xpath->query('//div[contains(@class, "twibbon-preview")]//img');
85:                 
86:                 if ($images->length > 0) {
87:                     return $images[0]->getAttribute('src');
88:                 }
89:             }
90:             
91:             // Return a default image if preview image can't be found
92:             return asset('img/twibbon-default.png');
93:             
94:         } catch (\Exception $e) {
95:             // Return default image on error
96:             return asset('img/twibbon-default.png');
97:         }
98:     }
99: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/VideoController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
 7: 
 8: class VideoController extends Controller
 9: {
10:     public function index(Request $request)
11:     {
12:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'dokum_video');
13:         
14:         // Search functionality
15:         if ($request->has('search')) {
16:             $search = $request->search;
17:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
18:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', "%{$search}%")
19:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', "%{$search}%");
20:             });
21:         }
22: 
23:         // Sort functionality
24:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'newest');
25:         if ($sort === 'oldest') {
26:             $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
27:         } else {
28:             $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
29:         }
30: 
31:         $videos = $query->paginate(12);
32:         return view('pages.picture.dokumentasi.video.index', compact('videos'));
33:     }
34: }

================
File: app/Http/Controllers/ZoomBackgroundController.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Controllers;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 6: use App\Models\ProdukModel;
 7: 
 8: class ZoomBackgroundController extends Controller
 9: {
10:     public function index(Request $request)
11:     {
12:         $sort = $request->get('sort', 'terbaru');
13:         $search = $request->get('search', '');
14: 
15:         // Query untuk zoom background
16:         $query = ProdukModel::where('kategori', 'zoom_background');
17: 
18:         // Filter pencarian
19:         if (!empty($search)) {
20:             $query->where(function($q) use ($search) {
21:                 $q->where('nama', 'like', '%'.$search.'%')
22:                   ->orWhere('deskripsi', 'like', '%'.$search.'%');
23:             });
24:         }
25: 
26:         // Sorting
27:         switch ($sort) {
28:             case 'terlama':
29:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'asc');
30:                 break;
31:             case 'a-z':
32:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'asc');
33:                 break;
34:             case 'z-a':
35:                 $query->orderBy('nama', 'desc');
36:                 break;
37:             case 'terbaru':
38:             default:
39:                 $query->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
40:                 break;
41:         }
42: 
43:         // Pagination dengan 12 item per halaman
44:         $items = $query->paginate(12)->withQueryString();
45: 
46:         // Response untuk AJAX request
47:         if ($request->ajax()) {
48:             return response()->json([
49:                 'items' => $items,
50:                 'html' => view('pages.picture.background-zoom.partials.items', compact('items'))->render()
51:             ]);
52:         }
53: 
54:         // Return view biasa
55:         return view('pages.picture.background-zoom.index', [
56:             'items' => $items,
57:             'sort' => $sort,
58:             'search' => $search
59:         ]);
60:     }
61: }

================
File: app/Http/Middleware/CekLogin.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;
 4: 
 5: use Closure;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
 8: 
 9: class CekLogin
10: {
11:     /**
12:      * Handle an incoming request.
13:      *
14:      * @param  \Closure(\Illuminate\Http\Request): (\Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response)  $next
15:      */
16:     public function handle($request, Closure $next)
17:     {
18: 
19:         if (!\Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth::check()) {
20:             return redirect('/login');
21:         }
22:     
23:         return $next($request);
24:     }
25:     
26: }

================
File: app/Http/Middleware/IsAdmin.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;
 4: 
 5: use Closure;
 6: use Illuminate\Http\Request;
 7: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;
 8: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth; // tambah ini
 9: 
10: class IsAdmin
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Handle an incoming request.
14:      *
15:      * @param  \Closure(\Illuminate\Http\Request): (\Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response)  $next
16:      */
17:     public function handle(Request $request, Closure $next): Response
18:     {
19:         // Cek apakah user login dan rolenya admin
20:         if (Auth::check() && Auth::user()->role === 'admin') {
21:             return $next($request);
22:         }
23: 
24:         // Kalau bukan admin, bisa redirect atau abort
25:         abort(403, 'Unauthorized');
26:     }
27: }

 2: 
 3: namespace App\Http\Middleware;

 7: use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response;

 9: 
10: class IsUserB
11: {
12:     /**
13:      * Handle an incoming request.
14:      *
15:      * @param  \Closure(\Illuminate\Http\Request): (\Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Response)  $next

20:         if (Auth::check() && Auth::user()->role === 'userb' || Auth::user()->role === 'userk' ) {
21:             return $next($request);
22:         }
23: 
24:         // Kalau bukan admin, bisa redirect atau abort
25:         abort(403, 'Unauthorized');
26:     }
27: }

================
File: app/Models/User.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace App\Models;
 4: 
 5: // use Illuminate\Contracts\Auth\MustVerifyEmail;
 6: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\HasFactory;
 7: use Illuminate\Foundation\Auth\User as Authenticatable;
 8: use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable;
 9: 
10: class User extends Authenticatable
11: {
12:     /** @use HasFactory<\Database\Factories\UserFactory> */
13:     use HasFactory, Notifiable;
14: 
15:     protected $table = 'user'; // Explicitly set the table name
16:     protected $primaryKey = 'id_user'; // Explicitly set the primary key
17: 
18:     /**
19:      * The attributes that are mass assignable.
20:      *
21:      * @var list<string>
22:      */
23:     protected $fillable = [
24:         'name',
25:         'email',
26:         'password',
27:     ];
28: 
29:     /**
30:      * The attributes that should be hidden for serialization.
31:      *
32:      * @var list<string>
33:      */
34:     protected $hidden = [
35:         'password',
36:         'remember_token',
37:     ];
38: 
39:     /**
40:      * Get the attributes that should be cast.
41:      *
42:      * @return array<string, string>
43:      */
44:     protected function casts(): array
45:     {
46:         return [
47:             'email_verified_at' => 'datetime',
48:             'password' => 'hashed',
49:         ];
50:     }
51: }

File: config/auth.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: return [
  4: 
  5:     /*
  6:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  7:     | Authentication Defaults
  8:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  9:     |
 10:     | This option defines the default authentication "guard" and password
 11:     | reset "broker" for your application. You may change these values
 12:     | as required, but they're a perfect start for most applications.
 13:     |
 14:     */
 15: 
 16:     'defaults' => [
 17:         'guard' => env('AUTH_GUARD', 'web'),
 18:         'passwords' => env('AUTH_PASSWORD_BROKER', 'users'),
 19:     ],
 20: 
 21:     /*
 22:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 23:     | Authentication Guards
 24:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 25:     |
 26:     | Next, you may define every authentication guard for your application.
 27:     | Of course, a great default configuration has been defined for you
 28:     | which utilizes session storage plus the Eloquent user provider.
 29:     |
 30:     | All authentication guards have a user provider, which defines how the
 31:     | users are actually retrieved out of your database or other storage
 32:     | system used by the application. Typically, Eloquent is utilized.
 33:     |
 34:     | Supported: "session"
 35:     |
 36:     */
 37: 
 38:     'guards' => [
 39:         'web' => [
 40:             'driver' => 'session',
 41:             'provider' => 'users',
 42:         ],
 43:     ],
 44: 
 45: 
 46:     /*
 47:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 48:     | User Providers
 49:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 50:     |
 51:     | All authentication guards have a user provider, which defines how the
 52:     | users are actually retrieved out of your database or other storage
 53:     | system used by the application. Typically, Eloquent is utilized.
 54:     |
 55:     | If you have multiple user tables or models you may configure multiple
 56:     | providers to represent the model / table. These providers may then
 57:     | be assigned to any extra authentication guards you have defined.
 58:     |
 59:     | Supported: "database", "eloquent"
 60:     |
 61:     */
 62: 
 63:     // 'providers' => [
 64:     //     'users' => [
 65:     //         'driver' => 'eloquent',
 66:     //         'model' => env('AUTH_MODEL', App\Models\User::class),
 67:     //     ],
 68: 
 69:     'providers' => [
 70:         'users' => [
 71:             'driver' => 'eloquent',
 72:             'model' => App\Models\UserModel::class,
 73:         ],
 74: 
 75: 
 76:         
 77:         // 'users' => [
 78:         //     'driver' => 'database',
 79:         //     'table' => 'users',
 80:         // ],
 81:     ],
 82: 
 83:     /*
 84:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 85:     | Resetting Passwords
 86:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 87:     |
 88:     | These configuration options specify the behavior of Laravel's password
 89:     | reset functionality, including the table utilized for token storage
 90:     | and the user provider that is invoked to actually retrieve users.
 91:     |
 92:     | The expiry time is the number of minutes that each reset token will be
 93:     | considered valid. This security feature keeps tokens short-lived so
 94:     | they have less time to be guessed. You may change this as needed.
 95:     |
 96:     | The throttle setting is the number of seconds a user must wait before
 97:     | generating more password reset tokens. This prevents the user from
 98:     | quickly generating a very large amount of password reset tokens.
 99:     |
100:     */
101: 
102:     'passwords' => [
103:         'users' => [
104:             'provider' => 'users',
105:             'table' => env('AUTH_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN_TABLE', 'password_reset_tokens'),
106:             'expire' => 60,
107:             'throttle' => 60,
108:         ],
109:     ],
110: 
111:     /*
112:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
113:     | Password Confirmation Timeout
114:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
115:     |
116:     | Here you may define the amount of seconds before a password confirmation
117:     | window expires and users are asked to re-enter their password via the
118:     | confirmation screen. By default, the timeout lasts for three hours.
119:     |
120:     */
121: 
122:     'password_timeout' => env('AUTH_PASSWORD_TIMEOUT', 10800),
123: 
124: ];

================
File: config/cache.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
  4: 
  5: return [
  6: 
  7:     /*
  8:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  9:     | Default Cache Store
 10:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 11:     |
 12:     | This option controls the default cache store that will be used by the
 13:     | framework. This connection is utilized if another isn't explicitly
 14:     | specified when running a cache operation inside the application.
 15:     |
 16:     */
 17: 
 18:     'default' => env('CACHE_STORE', 'database'),
 19: 
 20:     /*
 21:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 22:     | Cache Stores
 23:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 24:     |
 25:     | Here you may define all of the cache "stores" for your application as
 26:     | well as their drivers. You may even define multiple stores for the
 27:     | same cache driver to group types of items stored in your caches.
 28:     |
 29:     | Supported drivers: "array", "database", "file", "memcached",
 30:     |                    "redis", "dynamodb", "octane", "null"
 31:     |
 32:     */
 33: 
 34:     'stores' => [
 35: 
 36:         'array' => [
 37:             'driver' => 'array',
 38:             'serialize' => false,
 39:         ],
 40: 
 41:         'database' => [
 42:             'driver' => 'database',
 43:             'connection' => env('DB_CACHE_CONNECTION'),
 44:             'table' => env('DB_CACHE_TABLE', 'cache'),
 45:             'lock_connection' => env('DB_CACHE_LOCK_CONNECTION'),
 46:             'lock_table' => env('DB_CACHE_LOCK_TABLE'),
 47:         ],
 48: 
 49:         'file' => [
 50:             'driver' => 'file',
 51:             'path' => storage_path('framework/cache/data'),
 52:             'lock_path' => storage_path('framework/cache/data'),
 53:         ],
 54: 
 55:         'memcached' => [
 56:             'driver' => 'memcached',
 57:             'persistent_id' => env('MEMCACHED_PERSISTENT_ID'),

 59:                 env('MEMCACHED_USERNAME'),
 60:                 env('MEMCACHED_PASSWORD'),
 61:             ],

 63:                 // Memcached::OPT_CONNECT_TIMEOUT => 2000,
 64:             ],
 65:             'servers' => [
 66:                 [
 67:                     'host' => env('MEMCACHED_HOST', '127.0.0.1'),
 68:                     'port' => env('MEMCACHED_PORT', 11211),
 69:                     'weight' => 100,
 70:                 ],
 71:             ],
 72:         ],
 73: 
 74:         'redis' => [
 75:             'driver' => 'redis',
 76:             'connection' => env('REDIS_CACHE_CONNECTION', 'cache'),
 77:             'lock_connection' => env('REDIS_CACHE_LOCK_CONNECTION', 'default'),
 78:         ],
 79: 
 80:         'dynamodb' => [
 81:             'driver' => 'dynamodb',

 91:         ],
 92: 
 93:     ],
 94: 
 95:     /*
 96:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 97:     | Cache Key Prefix
 98:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 99:     |
100:     | When utilizing the APC, database, memcached, Redis, and DynamoDB cache
101:     | stores, there might be other applications using the same cache. For
102:     | that reason, you may prefix every cache key to avoid collisions.
103:     |
104:     */
105: 
106:     'prefix' => env('CACHE_PREFIX', Str::slug(env('APP_NAME', 'laravel'), '_').'_cache_'),
107: 
108: ];

File: config/logging.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: use Monolog\Handler\NullHandler;
  4: use Monolog\Handler\StreamHandler;
  5: use Monolog\Handler\SyslogUdpHandler;
  6: use Monolog\Processor\PsrLogMessageProcessor;
  7: 
  8: return [
  9: 
 10:     /*
 11:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 12:     | Default Log Channel
 13:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 14:     |
 15:     | This option defines the default log channel that is utilized to write
 16:     | messages to your logs. The value provided here should match one of
 17:     | the channels present in the list of "channels" configured below.
 18:     |
 19:     */
 20: 
 21:     'default' => env('LOG_CHANNEL', 'stack'),
 22: 
 23:     /*
 24:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 25:     | Deprecations Log Channel
 26:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 27:     |
 28:     | This option controls the log channel that should be used to log warnings
 29:     | regarding deprecated PHP and library features. This allows you to get
 30:     | your application ready for upcoming major versions of dependencies.
 31:     |
 32:     */
 33: 
 34:     'deprecations' => [
 35:         'channel' => env('LOG_DEPRECATIONS_CHANNEL', 'null'),
 36:         'trace' => env('LOG_DEPRECATIONS_TRACE', false),
 37:     ],
 38: 
 39:     /*
 40:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 41:     | Log Channels
 42:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 43:     |
 44:     | Here you may configure the log channels for your application. Laravel
 45:     | utilizes the Monolog PHP logging library, which includes a variety
 46:     | of powerful log handlers and formatters that you're free to use.
 47:     |
 48:     | Available drivers: "single", "daily", "slack", "syslog",
 49:     |                    "errorlog", "monolog", "custom", "stack"
 50:     |
 51:     */
 52: 
 53:     'channels' => [
 54: 
 55:         'stack' => [
 56:             'driver' => 'stack',
 57:             'channels' => explode(',', env('LOG_STACK', 'single')),
 58:             'ignore_exceptions' => false,
 59:         ],
 60: 
 61:         'single' => [
 62:             'driver' => 'single',
 63:             'path' => storage_path('logs/laravel.log'),
 64:             'level' => env('LOG_LEVEL', 'debug'),
 65:             'replace_placeholders' => true,
 66:         ],
 67: 
 68:         'daily' => [
 69:             'driver' => 'daily',
 70:             'path' => storage_path('logs/laravel.log'),
 71:             'level' => env('LOG_LEVEL', 'debug'),
 72:             'days' => env('LOG_DAILY_DAYS', 14),
 73:             'replace_placeholders' => true,
 74:         ],
 75: 
 76:         'slack' => [
 77:             'driver' => 'slack',
 78:             'url' => env('LOG_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL'),
 79:             'username' => env('LOG_SLACK_USERNAME', 'Laravel Log'),
 80:             'emoji' => env('LOG_SLACK_EMOJI', ':boom:'),
 81:             'level' => env('LOG_LEVEL', 'critical'),
 82:             'replace_placeholders' => true,
 83:         ],
 84: 
 85:         'papertrail' => [
 86:             'driver' => 'monolog',
 87:             'level' => env('LOG_LEVEL', 'debug'),
 88:             'handler' => env('LOG_PAPERTRAIL_HANDLER', SyslogUdpHandler::class),
 89:             'handler_with' => [
 90:                 'host' => env('PAPERTRAIL_URL'),
 91:                 'port' => env('PAPERTRAIL_PORT'),
 92:                 'connectionString' => 'tls://'.env('PAPERTRAIL_URL').':'.env('PAPERTRAIL_PORT'),
 93:             ],
 94:             'processors' => [PsrLogMessageProcessor::class],
 95:         ],
 96:

100:             'handler' => StreamHandler::class,
101:             'handler_with' => [
102:                 'stream' => 'php://stderr',
103:             ],
104:             'formatter' => env('LOG_STDERR_FORMATTER'),
105:             'processors' => [PsrLogMessageProcessor::class],
106:         ],
107: 
108:         'syslog' => [
109:             'driver' => 'syslog',
110:             'level' => env('LOG_LEVEL', 'debug'),
111:             'facility' => env('LOG_SYSLOG_FACILITY', LOG_USER),
112:             'replace_placeholders' => true,
113:         ],
114:

119:         ],
120:

124:         ],

128:         ],
129: 
130:     ],
131: 
132: ];

 15:

 25:     | each backend supported by Laravel. You're also free to add more.
 26:     |
 27:     | Drivers: "sync", "database", "beanstalkd", "sqs", "redis", "null"
 28:     |
 29:     */
 30: 
 31:     'connections' => [
 32: 
 33:         'sync' => [
 34:             'driver' => 'sync',
 35:         ],
 36: 
 37:         'database' => [
 38:             'driver' => 'database',
 39:             'connection' => env('DB_QUEUE_CONNECTION'),
 40:             'table' => env('DB_QUEUE_TABLE', 'jobs'),
 41:             'queue' => env('DB_QUEUE', 'default'),

 47:             'driver' => 'beanstalkd',

 53:         ],

 55:         'sqs' => [
 56:             'driver' => 'sqs',
 57:             'key' => env('AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID'),
 58:             'secret' => env('AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY'),

 72:             'after_commit' => false,
 73:         ],

 75:     ],

 79:     | Job Batching

 84:     | connection and table which has been defined by your application.
 85:     |
 86:     */

 91:     ],
 92: 
 93:     /*
 94:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 95:     | Failed Queue Jobs
 96:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 97:     |

100:     | support for storing failed jobs in a simple file or in a database.
101:     |
102:     | Supported drivers: "database-uuids", "dynamodb", "file", "null"
103:     |
104:     */
105: 
106:     'failed' => [
107:         'driver' => env('QUEUE_FAILED_DRIVER', 'database-uuids'),
108:         'database' => env('DB_CONNECTION', 'sqlite'),
109:         'table' => 'failed_jobs',
110:     ],
111: 
112: ];

File: config/session.php
================
  1: <?php
  2: 
  3: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
  4: 
  5: return [
  6: 
  7:     /*
  8:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
  9:     | Default Session Driver
 10:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 11:     |
 12:     | This option determines the default session driver that is utilized for
 13:     | incoming requests. Laravel supports a variety of storage options to
 14:     | persist session data. Database storage is a great default choice.
 15:     |
 16:     | Supported: "file", "cookie", "database", "apc",
 17:     |            "memcached", "redis", "dynamodb", "array"
 18:     |
 19:     */
 20: 
 21:     'driver' => env('SESSION_DRIVER', 'database'),
 22: 
 23:     /*
 24:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 25:     | Session Lifetime
 26:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 27:     |
 28:     | Here you may specify the number of minutes that you wish the session
 29:     | to be allowed to remain idle before it expires. If you want them
 30:     | to expire immediately when the browser is closed then you may
 31:     | indicate that via the expire_on_close configuration option.
 32:     |
 33:     */
 34: 
 35:     'lifetime' => (int) env('SESSION_LIFETIME', 120),
 36: 
 37:     'expire_on_close' => env('SESSION_EXPIRE_ON_CLOSE', false),
 38: 
 39:     /*
 40:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 41:     | Session Encryption
 42:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 43:     |
 44:     | This option allows you to easily specify that all of your session data
 45:     | should be encrypted before it's stored. All encryption is performed
 46:     | automatically by Laravel and you may use the session like normal.
 47:     |
 48:     */
 49: 
 50:     'encrypt' => env('SESSION_ENCRYPT', false),
 51: 
 52:     /*
 53:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 54:     | Session File Location
 55:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 56:     |
 57:     | When utilizing the "file" session driver, the session files are placed
 58:     | on disk. The default storage location is defined here; however, you
 59:     | are free to provide another location where they should be stored.
 60:     |
 61:     */
 62: 
 63:     'files' => storage_path('framework/sessions'),
 64: 
 65:     /*
 66:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 67:     | Session Database Connection
 68:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 69:     |
 70:     | When using the "database" or "redis" session drivers, you may specify a
 71:     | connection that should be used to manage these sessions. This should
 72:     | correspond to a connection in your database configuration options.
 73:     |
 74:     */
 75: 
 76:     'connection' => env('SESSION_CONNECTION'),
 77: 
 78:     /*
 79:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 80:     | Session Database Table
 81:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 82:     |
 83:     | When using the "database" session driver, you may specify the table to
 84:     | be used to store sessions. Of course, a sensible default is defined
 85:     | for you; however, you're welcome to change this to another table.
 86:     |
 87:     */
 88: 
 89:     'table' => env('SESSION_TABLE', 'sessions'),
 90: 
 91:     /*
 92:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 93:     | Session Cache Store
 94:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
 95:     |
 96:     | When using one of the framework's cache driven session backends, you may
 97:     | define the cache store which should be used to store the session data
 98:     | between requests. This must match one of your defined cache stores.
 99:     |
100:     | Affects: "apc", "dynamodb", "memcached", "redis"
101:     |
102:     */
103: 
104:     'store' => env('SESSION_STORE'),
105: 
106:     /*
107:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
108:     | Session Sweeping Lottery
109:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
110:     |
111:     | Some session drivers must manually sweep their storage location to get
112:     | rid of old sessions from storage. Here are the chances that it will
113:     | happen on a given request. By default, the odds are 2 out of 100.
114:     |
115:     */
116: 
117:     'lottery' => [2, 100],
118: 
119:     /*
120:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
121:     | Session Cookie Name
122:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
123:     |
124:     | Here you may change the name of the session cookie that is created by
125:     | the framework. Typically, you should not need to change this value
126:     | since doing so does not grant a meaningful security improvement.
127:     |
128:     */
129: 
130:     'cookie' => env(
131:         'SESSION_COOKIE',
132:         Str::slug(env('APP_NAME', 'laravel'), '_').'_session'
133:     ),
134: 
135:     /*
136:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
137:     | Session Cookie Path
138:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
139:     |
140:     | The session cookie path determines the path for which the cookie will
141:     | be regarded as available. Typically, this will be the root path of
142:     | your application, but you're free to change this when necessary.
143:     |
144:     */
145: 
146:     'path' => env('SESSION_PATH', '/'),
147: 
148:     /*
149:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
150:     | Session Cookie Domain
151:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
152:     |
153:     | This value determines the domain and subdomains the session cookie is
154:     | available to. By default, the cookie will be available to the root
155:     | domain and all subdomains. Typically, this shouldn't be changed.
156:     |
157:     */
158: 
159:     'domain' => env('SESSION_DOMAIN'),
160: 
161:     /*
162:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
163:     | HTTPS Only Cookies
164:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
165:     |
166:     | By setting this option to true, session cookies will only be sent back
167:     | to the server if the browser has a HTTPS connection. This will keep
168:     | the cookie from being sent to you when it can't be done securely.
169:     |
170:     */
171: 
172:     'secure' => env('SESSION_SECURE_COOKIE'),
173: 
174:     /*
175:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
176:     | HTTP Access Only
177:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
178:     |
179:     | Setting this value to true will prevent JavaScript from accessing the
180:     | value of the cookie and the cookie will only be accessible through
181:     | the HTTP protocol. It's unlikely you should disable this option.
182:     |
183:     */
184: 
185:     'http_only' => env('SESSION_HTTP_ONLY', true),
186: 
187:     /*
188:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
189:     | Same-Site Cookies
190:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
191:     |
192:     | This option determines how your cookies behave when cross-site requests
193:     | take place, and can be used to mitigate CSRF attacks. By default, we
194:     | will set this value to "lax" to permit secure cross-site requests.
195:     |
196:     | See: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Headers/Set-Cookie#samesitesamesite-value
197:     |
198:     | Supported: "lax", "strict", "none", null
199:     |
200:     */
201: 
202:     'same_site' => env('SESSION_SAME_SITE', 'lax'),
203: 
204:     /*
205:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
206:     | Partitioned Cookies
207:     |--------------------------------------------------------------------------
208:     |
209:     | Setting this value to true will tie the cookie to the top-level site for
210:     | a cross-site context. Partitioned cookies are accepted by the browser
211:     | when flagged "secure" and the Same-Site attribute is set to "none".
212:     |
213:     */
214: 
215:     'partitioned' => env('SESSION_PARTITIONED_COOKIE', false),
216: 
217: ];

================
File: database/factories/UserFactory.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace Database\Factories;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\Factory;
 6: use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash;
 7: use Illuminate\Support\Str;
 8: 
 9: /**
10:  * @extends \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Factories\Factory<\App\Models\User>
11:  */
12: class UserFactory extends Factory
13: {
14:     /**
15:      * The current password being used by the factory.
16:      */
17:     protected static ?string $password;
18: 
19:     /**
20:      * Define the model's default state.
21:      *
22:      * @return array<string, mixed>
23:      */
24:     public function definition(): array
25:     {
26:         return [
27:             'name' => fake()->name(),
28:             'email' => fake()->unique()->safeEmail(),
29:             'email_verified_at' => now(),
30:             'password' => static::$password ??= Hash::make('password'),
31:             'remember_token' => Str::random(10),
32:         ];
33:     }
34: 
35:     /**
36:      * Indicate that the model's email address should be unverified.
37:      */
38:     public function unverified(): static
39:     {
40:         return $this->state(fn (array $attributes) => [
41:             'email_verified_at' => null,
42:         ]);
43:     }
44: }

File: database/seeders/AgendaSeeder.php
================
 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace Database\Seeders;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Database\Seeder;
 6: use App\Models\Agenda;
 7: use App\Models\UserModel;
 8: use Carbon\Carbon;
 9: 
10: class AgendaSeeder extends Seeder
11: {
12:     public function run(): void
13:     {
14:         // Get some user IDs to use
15:         $userIds = UserModel::pluck('id_user')->toArray();
16:         
17:         // Sample priorities
18:         $priorities = ['rendah', 'sedang', 'tinggi'];
19:         
20:         // Sample status
21:         $statuses = ['selesai', 'proses', 'pending'];
22:         
23:         // Sample divisions
24:         $divisions = ['IT', 'HR', 'Finance', 'Marketing', 'Operations'];
25: 
26:         // Create 20 sample agendas
27:         for ($i = 1; $i <= 20; $i++) {
28:             $startDate = Carbon::now()->addDays(rand(-30, 30));
29:             $endDate = Carbon::parse($startDate)->addDays(rand(1, 60));
30: 
31:             Agenda::create([
32:                 'nama_agenda' => "Agenda Test " . $i,
33:                 'id_user' => $userIds[array_rand($userIds)],
34:                 'divisi' => $divisions[array_rand($divisions)],
35:                 'status' => $statuses[array_rand($statuses)],
36:                 'tanggal_mulai' => $startDate,
37:                 'tanggal_deadline' => $endDate,
38:                 'prioritas' => $priorities[array_rand($priorities)],
39:                 'catatan' => "Ini adalah catatan untuk agenda test " . $i,
40:                 'created_at' => Carbon::now(),
41:                 'updated_at' => Carbon::now(),
42:             ]);
43:         }
44:     }
45: }

File: database/seeders/AnnualReportSeeder.php
================
 1: <?php
 2:

 1: <?php
 2: 
 3: namespace Database\Seeders;
 4: 
 5: use Illuminate\Database\Seeder;

 7: use Carbon\Carbon;
 8: 
 9: class MediaMonitoringSeeder extends Seeder
10: {
11:     public function run(): void
12:     {
13:         $sample_data = [
14:             [
15:                 'status' => 'positive',
16:                 'kesimpulan' => 'Rekind berhasil menyelesaikan proyek pembangunan kilang minyak tepat waktu',
17:                 'link' => 'https://example.com/news/rekind-success-1',
18:             ],
19:             [
20:                 'status' => 'neutral',
21:                 'kesimpulan' => 'Rekind mengumumkan rencana ekspansi bisnis di tahun 2025',
22:                 'link' => 'https://example.com/news/rekind-plans',
23:             ],
24:             [
25:                 'status' => 'positive',
26:                 'kesimpulan' => 'Rekind menerima penghargaan keselamatan kerja internasional',
27:                 'link' => 'https://example.com/news/rekind-award',
28:             ],
29:             [
30:                 'status' => 'negative',
31:                 'kesimpulan' => 'Proyek Rekind mengalami penundaan karena cuaca ekstrim',
32:                 'link' => 'https://example.com/news/project-delay',
33:             ],
34:             [
35:                 'status' => 'neutral',
36:                 'kesimpulan' => 'Rekind melakukan perekrutan besar-besaran untuk proyek baru',
37:                 'link' => 'https://example.com/news/recruitment',
38:             ]
39:         ];
40: 
41:         foreach ($sample_data as $data) {
42:             MediaMonitoring::create([
43:                 'status' => $data['status'],
44:                 'kesimpulan' => $data['kesimpulan'],
45:                 'link' => $data['link'],
46:                 'created_at' => Carbon::now()->subDays(rand(1, 30)),
47:                 'updated_at' => Carbon::now()
48:             ]);
49:         }
50:     }
51: }

File: database/seeders/PhotoSeeder.php

 8: class PhotoSeeder extends Seeder
